API
Light Up Total

LTS Platform API

API Documentation

Version
1.0.0
Base URL
http://localhost:3000
Auth
BEARER Auth
Date
2026-05-12

Table of Contents

  • Authentication 27 endpoints
    • POST /api/v1/auth/user/register — Register a new user
    • POST /api/v1/auth/user/verify-registration — Verify registration OTP
    • POST /api/v1/auth/user/resent-registration-verify — Resend registration verification OTP
    • POST /api/v1/auth/login — User login
    • POST /api/v1/auth/refresh — Refresh access token
    • POST /api/v1/auth/logout — User logout
    • POST /api/v1/auth/forgot-password — Request password reset OTP
    • POST /api/v1/auth/verify-reset-password — Verify password reset OTP
    • POST /api/v1/auth/reset-password — Reset password with OTP and reference code
    • GET /api/v1/auth/google — Initiate Google OAuth (User App)
    • GET /api/v1/auth/google/callback — Google OAuth callback (User App)
    • GET /api/v1/auth/google/employee — Initiate Google OAuth (Employee App)
    • GET /api/v1/auth/google/employee/callback — Google OAuth callback (Employee App)
    • GET /api/v1/auth/apple — Initiate Apple OAuth (User App)
    • POST /api/v1/auth/apple/callback — Apple OAuth callback (User App)
    • GET /api/v1/auth/apple/employee — Initiate Apple OAuth (Employee App)
    • POST /api/v1/auth/apple/employee/callback — Apple OAuth callback (Employee App)
    • POST /api/v1/auth/google/token — Google Sign-In via native SDK token
    • POST /api/v1/auth/apple/token — Apple Sign-In via native SDK token
    • POST /api/v1/auth/oauth/link — Link OAuth provider
    • DELETE /api/v1/auth/oauth/{provider} — Unlink OAuth provider
    • POST /api/v1/auth/users — Create user (System Admin only)
    • POST /api/v1/auth/customer/login — Customer service login
    • POST /api/v1/auth/employee/login — Employee service login
    • GET /api/v1/auth/odoo/employee — Initiate Odoo OAuth (Employee App)
    • GET /api/v1/auth/odoo/exchange — Exchange one-time OAuth code for tokens
    • GET /api/v1/auth/odoo/employee/callback — Odoo OAuth callback (Employee App)
  • OTP 3 endpoints
    • POST /api/v1/otp/send — Send OTP
    • POST /api/v1/otp/verify — Verify OTP
    • POST /api/v1/otp/resend — Resend OTP
  • User 5 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/user/profile — Get user profile
    • PUT /api/v1/user/profile — Update user profile
    • POST /api/v1/user/change-password — Change user password
    • POST /api/v1/user/profile-image — Upload profile image
    • POST /api/v1/user/terminate-account — Terminate your own account
  • User Files - Profile Images 4 endpoints
    • POST /api/v1/users/profile-images/{userId}/upload — Upload profile image(s)
    • GET /api/v1/users/profile-images/{userId} — List all profile images
    • GET /api/v1/users/profile-images/{userId}/{fileName} — Get profile image info
    • DELETE /api/v1/users/profile-images/{userId}/{fileName} — Delete profile image
  • User Files - Attachments 5 endpoints
    • POST /api/v1/users/attachments/{userId}/upload — Upload attachment(s)
    • PUT /api/v1/users/attachments/{userId}/replace-all — Replace all attachments (full sync)
    • GET /api/v1/users/attachments/{userId} — List all attachments
    • GET /api/v1/users/attachments/{userId}/{fileName} — Get attachment info
    • DELETE /api/v1/users/attachments/{userId}/{fileName} — Delete attachment
  • User Temporary Data 9 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/user/temp-data — Get user temporary data with pagination and filtering
    • POST /api/v1/user/temp-data — Create a new user temporary data record
    • GET /api/v1/user/temp-data/stats — Get user temporary data statistics
    • GET /api/v1/user/temp-data/{id} — Get user temporary data by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/user/temp-data/{id} — Update user temporary data
    • DELETE /api/v1/user/temp-data/{id} — Delete user temporary data
    • GET /api/v1/user/temp-data/user/{userId}/flag/{flag} — Get user temporary data by user ID and flag
    • DELETE /api/v1/user/temp-data/user/{userId} — Delete all user temporary data for a specific user
    • DELETE /api/v1/user/temp-data/flag/{flag} — Delete all user temporary data for a specific flag
  • Notifications 4 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/notifications — List my notifications
    • PATCH /api/v1/notifications/read-all — Mark all notifications as read
    • PATCH /api/v1/notifications/{id}/read — Mark a notification as read
    • DELETE /api/v1/notifications/{id} — Delete a notification
  • Customers 3 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/customer — Get all customers
    • POST /api/v1/customer — Create a new customer
    • POST /api/v1/customer/check-email — Check if email is available
  • Customer - Profiles 7 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/customer/profile — Get personal profile
    • PUT /api/v1/customer/profile — Update personal profile
    • GET /api/v1/customer/profiles — Get customer's own profiles
    • POST /api/v1/customer/profiles — Create a new profile
    • GET /api/v1/customer/profiles/{id} — Get profile details
    • PUT /api/v1/customer/profiles/{id} — Update a profile
    • DELETE /api/v1/customer/profiles/{id} — Delete a profile
  • Customer - Projects 5 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/customer/profiles/{profileId}/projects — Get projects for a profile
    • POST /api/v1/customer/profiles/{profileId}/projects — Create a new project
    • GET /api/v1/customer/profiles/{profileId}/projects/{id} — Get project details
    • PUT /api/v1/customer/profiles/{profileId}/projects/{id} — Update a project
    • DELETE /api/v1/customer/profiles/{profileId}/projects/{id} — Delete a project
  • Customer - Tickets 9 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/customer/tickets — Get customer tickets
    • POST /api/v1/customer/tickets — Create a new ticket
    • GET /api/v1/customer/tickets/{id} — Get ticket details
    • PUT /api/v1/customer/tickets/{id} — Update a ticket
    • GET /api/v1/customer/tickets/{id}/next-steps — Get available next steps
    • POST /api/v1/customer/tickets/{ticketId}/costs/{costId}/respond — Accept or reject a specific cost list
    • POST /api/v1/customer/tickets/{id}/rate-comment — Rate ticket experience
    • POST /api/v1/customer/tickets/{id}/complete — Customer completes their ticket (normal close)
    • POST /api/v1/customer/tickets/{id}/reject — Customer rejects/cancels their ticket (force close from any step)
  • Customer - Device Tokens 2 endpoints
    • POST /api/v1/customer/device-tokens — Register Expo push notification token
    • DELETE /api/v1/customer/device-tokens/{token} — Remove Expo push notification token
  • Employee - Profile 1 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/employee/profile — Get employee profile
  • Employee - Management 4 endpoints
    • POST /api/v1/employee — Create a new employee
    • GET /api/v1/employee/employees — Get all employees
    • GET /api/v1/employee/employees/{id} — Get employee by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/employee/employees/{id} — Update employee details
  • Employee - Users 3 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/employee/users — Get all users with pagination and filtering
    • GET /api/v1/employee/users/{id} — Get user by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/employee/users/{id}/update-status — Update user status (ACTIVE/INACTIVE)
  • Employee - Dashboard 4 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/employee/dashboard — Get dashboard data
    • GET /api/v1/employee/dashboard/stats — Get detailed dashboard statistics
    • GET /api/v1/employee/dashboard/queue — Get ticket queue stats by ticket type
    • GET /api/v1/employee/dashboard/overview — Get overview stats for dashboard charts and KPIs
  • Employee - Tickets 12 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/employee/tickets — Get all tickets with full access
    • POST /api/v1/employee/tickets — Create ticket on behalf of customer (phone call support)
    • GET /api/v1/employee/tickets/steps — Get ticket steps for dropdown
    • GET /api/v1/employee/tickets/statuses — Get ticket statuses for dropdown
    • GET /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id} — Get ticket by ID with full details
    • PUT /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id} — Update ticket details
    • DELETE /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id} — Delete a ticket
    • GET /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id}/next-status — Get next available statuses for a ticket
    • GET /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id}/reject-status — Get the REJECT end-step status for a ticket's workflow
    • POST /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id}/update-status — Update ticket status with comprehensive workflow validation
    • POST /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id}/attachments — Upload ticket-level attachments
    • DELETE /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id}/attachments/{attachmentId} — Delete a ticket attachment
  • Employee - Comments 2 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id}/comments — Get all comments for a ticket
    • POST /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id}/comments — Add a comment to a ticket
  • Employee - Ticket Costs 3 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id}/costs/{costId} — Get a single cost list
    • POST /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id}/costs/{costId} — Replace details of a cost list (or soft-delete with empty array)
    • POST /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id}/costs — Create a new cost list for a ticket
  • Employee - Ticket Types 2 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/employee/ticket-types — Get all ticket types
    • POST /api/v1/employee/ticket-types — Create a new ticket type
  • Employee - Assignments 3 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id}/assignments — Get assignment history for a ticket
    • POST /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id}/assign — Assign a ticket to an employee
    • POST /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id}/reassign — Reassign a ticket to a different employee
  • Employee - Workflows 4 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/employee/workflows — Get all workflows
    • POST /api/v1/employee/workflows — Create a new workflow
    • GET /api/v1/employee/workflow-steps — Get workflow steps
    • POST /api/v1/employee/workflow-steps — Create a new workflow step
  • Employee - Customers 6 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/employee/customers — Get all customers
    • GET /api/v1/employee/customers/{customerId} — Get customer by ID
    • GET /api/v1/employee/customers/{customerId}/profiles — Get customer profiles
    • GET /api/v1/employee/customers/{customerId}/profiles/{profileId} — Get customer profile by ID
    • GET /api/v1/employee/customers/{customerId}/profiles/{profileId}/projects — Get customer profile projects
    • GET /api/v1/employee/customers/{customerId}/profiles/{profileId}/projects/{projectId} — Get customer profile project by ID
  • Employee - Password Reset 4 endpoints
    • POST /api/v1/employee/password-reset/request — Request a password reset
    • POST /api/v1/employee/password-reset/{id}/respond — Approve or reject a password reset request
    • GET /api/v1/employee/password-reset — Get all password reset requests
    • GET /api/v1/employee/password-reset/{id} — Get a password reset request by ID
  • Presence 1 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/employee/presence/online — Get currently online users
  • Tickets 14 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/ticket/stats — Get ticket statistics
    • GET /api/v1/ticket/options — Get dropdown options for tickets
    • GET /api/v1/ticket/{id} — Get ticket by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/ticket/{id} — Update ticket
    • GET /api/v1/ticket/{id}/costs — Get ticket costs
    • POST /api/v1/ticket/{id}/close — Force-close a ticket
    • GET /api/v1/ticket/{id}/comments — Get all comments for a ticket
    • POST /api/v1/ticket/{id}/comments — Add comment to ticket
    • GET /api/v1/ticket/{id}/comments/rating — Get rating comment for a ticket
    • PUT /api/v1/ticket/{id}/comments/{commentId} — Edit a comment (text only)
    • DELETE /api/v1/ticket/{id}/comments/{commentId} — Soft-delete a comment (unsent)
    • GET /api/v1/ticket/{id}/comments/{commentId}/attachments — Get attachments for a specific comment
    • GET /api/v1/ticket/{id}/attachments — Get all attachments for a ticket
    • POST /api/v1/ticket/{id}/attachments — Upload attachment to ticket
  • Ticket Types 5 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/ticket/type — Get all ticket types
    • POST /api/v1/ticket/type — Create a new ticket type
    • GET /api/v1/ticket/type/{id} — Get ticket type by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/ticket/type/{id} — Update ticket type
    • DELETE /api/v1/ticket/type/{id} — Delete ticket type
  • Ticket Subjects 5 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/ticket/subject — Get all ticket subjects
    • POST /api/v1/ticket/subject — Create a new ticket subject
    • GET /api/v1/ticket/subject/{id} — Get ticket subject by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/ticket/subject/{id} — Update ticket subject
    • DELETE /api/v1/ticket/subject/{id} — Delete ticket subject
  • Ticket Subject Tags 6 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/ticket/subject/{subjectId}/tag — Get all tags for a subject
    • POST /api/v1/ticket/subject/{subjectId}/tag — Create a new tag
    • GET /api/v1/ticket/subject/{subjectId}/tag/{tagId} — Get tag by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/ticket/subject/{subjectId}/tag/{tagId} — Update tag
    • DELETE /api/v1/ticket/subject/{subjectId}/tag/{tagId} — Delete tag
    • GET /api/v1/ticket/tag — Get all ticket tags
  • Priorities 5 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/ticket/priority — Get all priorities
    • POST /api/v1/ticket/priority — Create a new priority
    • GET /api/v1/ticket/priority/{id} — Get priority by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/ticket/priority/{id} — Update priority
    • DELETE /api/v1/ticket/priority/{id} — Delete priority
  • Info Types 5 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/info-type — Get all info types
    • POST /api/v1/info-type — Create a new info type
    • GET /api/v1/info-type/{id} — Get info type by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/info-type/{id} — Update info type
    • DELETE /api/v1/info-type/{id} — Delete info type
  • Receipt Methods 6 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/receipt-method — Get receipt methods with pagination
    • POST /api/v1/receipt-method — Create a new receipt method
    • GET /api/v1/receipt-method/active — Get active receipt methods
    • GET /api/v1/receipt-method/{id} — Get receipt method by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/receipt-method/{id} — Update receipt method
    • DELETE /api/v1/receipt-method/{id} — Deactivate receipt method
  • Workflows 6 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/workflows — Get all workflows
    • POST /api/v1/workflows — Create a new workflow
    • GET /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId} — Get workflow by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId} — Update workflow
    • DELETE /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId} — Delete workflow
    • POST /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/activate — Activate workflow
  • Workflow Steps 6 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps — Get all steps for a workflow
    • POST /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps — Create a new step
    • GET /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/{stepId} — Get step by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/{stepId} — Update step
    • DELETE /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/{stepId} — Delete step
    • POST /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/reorder — Reorder steps
  • Workflow Step Statuses 6 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/{stepId}/statuses — Get all statuses for a step
    • POST /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/{stepId}/statuses — Create a new status
    • GET /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/{stepId}/statuses/{statusId} — Get status by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/{stepId}/statuses/{statusId} — Update status
    • DELETE /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/{stepId}/statuses/{statusId} — Delete status
    • POST /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/{stepId}/statuses/reorder — Reorder statuses
  • Approvals 8 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/approval — List all approval requests (history) with filters and pagination
    • POST /api/v1/approval — Manually trigger an approval request (SystemAdmin/system use)
    • GET /api/v1/approval/ticket/{ticketId} — List all approval requests for a ticket (all statuses)
    • GET /api/v1/approval/{id} — Get approval request detail
    • POST /api/v1/approval/{id} — Respond to an approval request (approve/reject items)
    • POST /api/v1/approval/{id}/duplicate — Duplicate an approval request for editing
    • POST /api/v1/approval/{id}/complete — Mark an approval request as COMPLETED (locks editing)
    • GET /api/v1/approval/{id}/authorize — Check if the current JWT user is authorized to respond to this approval
  • ApprovalRules 5 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/approval/rules — List all approval rules
    • POST /api/v1/approval/rules — Create an approval rule
    • GET /api/v1/approval/rules/{id} — Get approval rule by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/approval/rules/{id} — Update an approval rule
    • DELETE /api/v1/approval/rules/{id} — Delete an approval rule
  • Attachments 5 endpoints
    • POST /api/v1/attachments/upload — Upload ticket attachment(s)
    • GET /api/v1/attachments/{id} — Get attachment details
    • DELETE /api/v1/attachments/{id} — Delete attachment
    • GET /api/v1/attachments/{id}/download — Download attachment file
    • GET /api/v1/tickets/{ticketId}/attachments — Get all attachments for a ticket
  • Master Data - Address 26 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/data/address/search — Search addresses with language support
    • GET /api/v1/data/address/country — Get all countries
    • POST /api/v1/data/address/country — Create a new country
    • GET /api/v1/data/address/country/{id} — Get country by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/data/address/country/{id} — Update a country
    • DELETE /api/v1/data/address/country/{id} — Delete a country
    • GET /api/v1/data/address/province — Get all provinces with pagination
    • POST /api/v1/data/address/province — Create a new province
    • GET /api/v1/data/address/province/{id} — Get province by ID
    • POST /api/v1/data/address/province/bulk/delete — Bulk delete provinces
    • POST /api/v1/data/address/province/bulk/status — Bulk update province status
    • GET /api/v1/data/address/district — Get all districts with pagination
    • POST /api/v1/data/address/district — Create a new district
    • GET /api/v1/data/address/district/{id} — Get district by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/data/address/district/{id} — Update a district
    • DELETE /api/v1/data/address/district/{id} — Delete a district
    • POST /api/v1/data/address/district/bulk/delete — Bulk delete districts
    • POST /api/v1/data/address/district/bulk/status — Bulk update district status
    • GET /api/v1/data/address/sub-district — Get all sub-districts with pagination
    • POST /api/v1/data/address/sub-district — Create a new sub-district
    • GET /api/v1/data/address/sub-district/{id} — Get sub-district by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/data/address/sub-district/{id} — Update a sub-district
    • DELETE /api/v1/data/address/sub-district/{id} — Delete a sub-district
    • POST /api/v1/data/address/sub-district/bulk/delete — Bulk delete sub-districts
    • POST /api/v1/data/address/sub-district/bulk/status — Bulk update sub-district status
    • GET /api/v1/data/address/hierarchy — Get address hierarchy
  • Master Data - Organization 27 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/data/organization/division — Get all divisions with pagination
    • POST /api/v1/data/organization/division — Create a new division
    • GET /api/v1/data/organization/division/code/{code} — Get division by code
    • GET /api/v1/data/organization/division/{id} — Get division by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/data/organization/division/{id} — Update a division
    • DELETE /api/v1/data/organization/division/{id} — Delete a division

    • POST /api/v1/data/organization/department — Create a new department
    • GET /api/v1/data/organization/department/code/{code} — Get department by code
    • GET /api/v1/data/organization/department/{id} — Get department by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/data/organization/department/{id} — Update a department
    • DELETE /api/v1/data/organization/department/{id} — Delete a department
    • GET /api/v1/data/organization/position — Get all positions
    • POST /api/v1/data/organization/position — Create a new position
    • GET /api/v1/data/organization/position/code/{code} — Get position by code
    • GET /api/v1/data/organization/position/{id} — Get position by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/data/organization/position/{id} — Update a position
    • DELETE /api/v1/data/organization/position/{id} — Delete a position
    • POST /api/v1/data/organization/division/bulk-delete — Bulk delete divisions
    • POST /api/v1/data/organization/division/bulk-status — Bulk update division status
    • POST /api/v1/data/organization/division/reorder — Reorder divisions

    • POST /api/v1/data/organization/department/bulk-status — Bulk update department status
    • POST /api/v1/data/organization/department/reorder — Reorder departments
    • POST /api/v1/data/organization/position/bulk-delete — Bulk delete positions
    • POST /api/v1/data/organization/position/bulk-status — Bulk update position status
    • POST /api/v1/data/organization/position/reorder — Reorder positions

    • GET /api/v1/data/prefix — Get all prefixes
    • POST /api/v1/data/prefix — Create a new prefix

    • GET /api/v1/data/prefix/{id} — Get prefix by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/data/prefix/{id} — Update a prefix
    • DELETE /api/v1/data/prefix/{id} — Delete a prefix

    • GET /api/v1/data/entity-type — Get all entity types

    • GET /api/v1/data/files/template — Download data template

    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/customers/customer — Get list of customers
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/customers/branch — Get customer branches
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/customers/contact — Get customer contacts
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/customers/group — Get customer groups
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/customers/type — Get customer types
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/employees/employee — Get employees
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/employees/department — Get employee departments
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/employees/position — Get employee positions
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/employees/side — Get employee sides
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/products/product — Get products

    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/products/type — Get product types
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/products/brand — Get product brands
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/products/unit — Get product units
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/vatgroup/group — Get VAT groups

    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/vendors/group — Get vendor groups
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/vendors/type — Get vendor types
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/documents/document — Get sale documents from Winspeed
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/documents/{docid}/goods — Get goods for a sale document
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/documents/docutype — Get document types
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/repodocuments/document — Get purchase documents from Winspeed
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/repodocuments/{docid}/goods — Get goods for a purchase document
    • GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/repodocuments/docutype — Get purchase document types
  • MinIO Proxy 3 endpoints
    • POST /api/v1/minio/presign/{bucket}/{objectPath} — Generate a presigned proxy URL
    • GET /api/v1/minio/{bucket}/{objectPath} — Stream file from MinIO
    • POST /api/v1/minio/{bucket}/{objectPath} — Generate a presigned proxy URL for a file
  • Config 6 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/config/static/upload — Get upload configuration
    • GET /api/v1/config/dynamic — Get all configurations
    • POST /api/v1/config/dynamic — Create new config
    • GET /api/v1/config/dynamic/{key} — Get config by key
    • PUT /api/v1/config/dynamic/{key} — Update config
    • DELETE /api/v1/config/dynamic/{key} — Delete config
  • System 1 endpoints
    • POST /api/v1/system/cache/flush — Flush all caches
  • Queue Management 5 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/queue/schedulers — List all job schedulers
    • POST /api/v1/queue/schedulers/{id}/enable — Enable (create or update) a job scheduler
    • DELETE /api/v1/queue/schedulers/{id} — Disable a job scheduler
    • GET /api/v1/queue/jobs — List recent jobs
    • POST /api/v1/queue/jobs/trigger — Manually trigger a job
  • Health 2 endpoints
    • GET /health — Check API health status
    • GET /api — Get API information
  • Health 1 endpoints
    • GET /health — Health check endpoint
  • Prefix 6 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/prefix — Get all prefixes with pagination
    • POST /api/v1/prefix — Create a new prefix
    • GET /api/v1/prefix/code/{code} — Get prefix by code
    • GET /api/v1/prefix/{id} — Get prefix by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/prefix/{id} — Update a prefix
    • DELETE /api/v1/prefix/{id} — Delete a prefix
  • Address - Countries 5 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/address/address/country — Get all countries
    • GET /api/v1/address/country/{id} — Get country by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/address/country/{id} — Update a country
    • DELETE /api/v1/address/country/{id} — Delete a country
    • POST /api/v1/address/country — Create a new country
  • Address - Provinces 7 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/address/province — Get all provinces with pagination
    • POST /api/v1/address/province — Create a new province
    • GET /api/v1/address/province/{id} — Get province by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/address/province/{id} — Update a province
    • DELETE /api/v1/address/province/{id} — Delete a province
    • POST /api/v1/address/province/bulk/delete — Bulk delete provinces
    • POST /api/v1/address/province/bulk/status — Bulk update province status
  • Address - Districts 7 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/address/district — Get all districts with pagination
    • POST /api/v1/address/district — Create a new district
    • GET /api/v1/address/district/{id} — Get district by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/address/district/{id} — Update a district
    • DELETE /api/v1/address/district/{id} — Delete a district
    • POST /api/v1/address/district/bulk/delete — Bulk delete districts
    • POST /api/v1/address/district/bulk/status — Bulk update district status
  • Address - Sub-districts 7 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/address/sub-district — Get all sub-districts with pagination
    • POST /api/v1/address/sub-district — Create a new sub-district
    • GET /api/v1/address/sub-district/{id} — Get sub-district by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/address/sub-district/{id} — Update a sub-district
    • DELETE /api/v1/address/sub-district/{id} — Delete a sub-district
    • POST /api/v1/address/sub-district/bulk/delete — Bulk delete sub-districts
    • POST /api/v1/address/sub-district/bulk/status — Bulk update sub-district status
  • Address - Hierarchy 1 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/address/hierarchy — Get address hierarchy
  • Organization - Divisions 9 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/organization/division — Get all divisions with pagination
    • POST /api/v1/organization/division — Create a new division
    • GET /api/v1/organization/division/code/{code} — Get division by code
    • GET /api/v1/organization/division/{id} — Get division by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/organization/division/{id} — Update a division
    • DELETE /api/v1/organization/division/{id} — Delete a division
    • POST /api/v1/organization/division/bulk-delete — Bulk delete divisions
    • POST /api/v1/organization/division/reorder — Reorder divisions
    • POST /api/v1/organization/division/bulk-status — Bulk update division status
  • Organization - Departments 9 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/organization/department — Get all departments with pagination
    • POST /api/v1/organization/department — Create a new department
    • GET /api/v1/organization/department/code/{code} — Get department by code
    • GET /api/v1/organization/department/{id} — Get department by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/organization/department/{id} — Update a department
    • DELETE /api/v1/organization/department/{id} — Delete a department
    • POST /api/v1/organization/department/bulk-delete — Bulk delete departments
    • POST /api/v1/organization/department/reorder — Reorder departments
    • POST /api/v1/organization/department/bulk-status — Bulk update department status
  • Organization - Positions 9 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/organization/position — Get all positions with pagination
    • POST /api/v1/organization/position — Create a new position
    • GET /api/v1/organization/position/code/{code} — Get position by code
    • GET /api/v1/organization/position/{id} — Get position by ID
    • PUT /api/v1/organization/position/{id} — Update a position
    • DELETE /api/v1/organization/position/{id} — Delete a position
    • POST /api/v1/organization/position/bulk-delete — Bulk delete positions
    • POST /api/v1/organization/position/reorder — Reorder positions
    • POST /api/v1/organization/position/bulk-status — Bulk update position status
  • File Management 6 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/files/template — Download data import template
    • POST /api/v1/files/upload — Upload data file
    • POST /api/v1/files/export — Export data
    • GET /api/v1/files — Get uploaded files
    • GET /api/v1/files/{fileId} — Download a specific file
    • DELETE /api/v1/files/{fileId} — Delete a file
  • Address - Search 1 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/address/search — Search addresses with language support
  • Entity Type 1 endpoints
    • GET /api/v1/entity-type — Get all entity types
  • System 1 endpoints
    • POST /api/v1/system/cache/flush — Flush all caches
  • Component Schemas 41 schemas

Authentication

User authentication and authorization endpoints

POST /api/v1/auth/user/register Register a new user
Create a new user account and customer profile in the system
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
email string <email> required User email address
password string <password> required User password
firstName string required First name
lastName string required Last name
phone string required Phone number with country code
taxId string Tax identification number (optional)
Responses
201 User registered successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string nullable Response data payload
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking
data string
└ user string
└ id string <uuid> required User unique identifier
└ username string required Unique username
└ email string <email> nullable User email (nullable for employees)
└ taxId string nullable Tax identification number
└ phone string nullable Phone number
└ firstName string required First name
└ lastName string required Last name
└ nickName string nullable Nickname
└ imageUrl string nullable Profile image URL
└ role string [CUSTOMER, EMPLOYEE, SYSTEM_ADMIN] required User role in the system
└ status string [ACTIVE, INACTIVE, DELETED, PENDING] required Account status
└ emailVerified string required Whether email is verified
└ phoneVerified string required Whether phone is verified
└ lastLoginAt string <date-time> nullable Last login timestamp
└ createdAt string <date-time> required Account creation timestamp
└ updatedAt string <date-time> required Last update timestamp
└ accessToken string JWT access token
└ refreshToken string JWT refresh token
└ expiresIn string Token expiration time
400 Validation error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
content string nullable
└ errors string Field-level validation errors
409 User already exists
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required Error message
errorCode string required Error code identifier
content string nullable Additional error details
timestamp string <date-time> nullable
requestId string nullable
POST /api/v1/auth/user/verify-registration Verify registration OTP
Verify email with OTP code and automatically log in the user
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
email string <email> required User email address
otp string required 6-digit OTP code from email
otpRef string required OTP reference code from registration response
Responses
200 Email verified and logged in successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string nullable Response data payload
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking
data string
└ user string
└ id string <uuid> required User unique identifier
└ username string required Unique username
└ email string <email> nullable User email (nullable for employees)
└ taxId string nullable Tax identification number
└ phone string nullable Phone number
└ firstName string required First name
└ lastName string required Last name
└ nickName string nullable Nickname
└ imageUrl string nullable Profile image URL
└ role string [CUSTOMER, EMPLOYEE, SYSTEM_ADMIN] required User role in the system
└ status string [ACTIVE, INACTIVE, DELETED, PENDING] required Account status
└ emailVerified string required Whether email is verified
└ phoneVerified string required Whether phone is verified
└ lastLoginAt string <date-time> nullable Last login timestamp
└ createdAt string <date-time> required Account creation timestamp
└ updatedAt string <date-time> required Last update timestamp
└ accessToken string JWT access token
└ refreshToken string JWT refresh token
└ expiresIn string Token expiration time
400 Invalid OTP or validation error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
content string nullable
└ errors string Field-level validation errors
500 Server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required Error message
errorCode string required Error code identifier
content string nullable Additional error details
timestamp string <date-time> nullable
requestId string nullable
POST /api/v1/auth/user/resent-registration-verify Resend registration verification OTP
Resend the OTP for email verification if the previous one expired
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
email string <email> required User email address
Responses
200 Verification code resent successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string nullable Response data payload
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking
data string
└ otpRef string New OTP reference code
└ otpExpiry string <date-time> Expiration time of the new OTP
└ email string User email
400 Validation error or invalid email

POST /api/v1/auth/login User login
Authenticate user with username and password
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
username string required Username for login
password string <password> required User password
rememberMe string Optional flag to set persistent authentication cookie (30 days)
Responses
200 Login successful
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string nullable Response data payload
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking

└ phoneVerified string required Whether phone is verified
└ lastLoginAt string <date-time> nullable Last login timestamp
└ createdAt string <date-time> required Account creation timestamp
└ updatedAt string <date-time> required Last update timestamp

└ expiresIn string Token expiration time

POST /api/v1/auth/forgot-password Request password reset OTP
Send OTP to user's email for password reset (CUSTOMER/EXTERNAL roles only)
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
email string <email> required User's email address
Responses
200 OTP sent successfully (or security message if email not found)
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string nullable Response data payload
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking
data string
└ message string Confirmation message
400 Validation error or employee account
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
content string nullable
└ errors string Field-level validation errors
POST /api/v1/auth/verify-reset-password Verify password reset OTP
Verifies the OTP and otpRef provided by the user. This is the step *before* resetting the password.
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
username string required User's username or email
otp string required 6-digit OTP code sent via email
otpRef string required 4-character reference code (A-Z0-9)
Responses
200 OTP verified successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string nullable Response data payload
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking
data string
└ message string Success confirmation message
400 Invalid OTP/otpRef, expired, or validation error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
content string nullable
└ errors string Field-level validation errors
POST /api/v1/auth/reset-password Reset password with OTP and reference code
Reset user password after OTP and otpRef verification for forgot-password purpose
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
username string required Username or email
newPassword string <password> required New password
otp string required 6-digit OTP code
otpRef string required 4-character reference code (A-Z0-9)
Responses
200 Password reset successful
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string nullable Response data payload
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking
data string
└ message string Success confirmation message
400 Invalid OTP/otpRef or validation error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
content string nullable
└ errors string Field-level validation errors

POST /api/v1/auth/customer/login Customer service login
Login for customer service with flexible username support (email or non-email format)
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
username string required Username (can be email format for customers or non-email for employees)
password string <password> required
Responses
200 Login successful
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string nullable Response data payload
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking
data string
└ user string
└ id string <uuid> required User unique identifier
└ username string required Unique username
└ email string <email> nullable User email (nullable for employees)
└ taxId string nullable Tax identification number
└ phone string nullable Phone number
└ firstName string required First name
└ lastName string required Last name
└ nickName string nullable Nickname
└ imageUrl string nullable Profile image URL
└ role string [CUSTOMER, EMPLOYEE, SYSTEM_ADMIN] required User role in the system
└ status string [ACTIVE, INACTIVE, DELETED, PENDING] required Account status
└ emailVerified string required Whether email is verified
└ phoneVerified string required Whether phone is verified
└ lastLoginAt string <date-time> nullable Last login timestamp
└ createdAt string <date-time> required Account creation timestamp
└ updatedAt string <date-time> required Last update timestamp
└ accessToken string JWT access token
└ refreshToken string JWT refresh token
401 Invalid credentials
POST /api/v1/auth/employee/login Employee service login
Login for employee service with employee-specific data including password change requirements
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
username string required Username (minimum 4 characters)
password string <password> required
Responses
200 Employee login successful
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
data string
└ user string
└ id string <uuid>
└ email string <email>
└ firstName string
└ lastName string
└ role string [EMPLOYEE, SYSTEM_ADMIN]
└ status string
└ phone string
└ profileImage string nullable
└ requireChangePassword string Whether employee must change password on next login
└ accessToken string JWT access token
└ refreshToken string JWT refresh token
└ expiresIn string Token expiration time in seconds
400 Validation error - Username/password required
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
401 Invalid credentials
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
403 Customer accounts cannot access employee service
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
GET /api/v1/auth/odoo/employee Initiate Odoo OAuth (Employee App)
Redirect to Odoo OAuth consent screen for employee app authentication
Responses
302 Redirect to Odoo OAuth
GET /api/v1/auth/odoo/exchange Exchange one-time OAuth code for tokens
Exchanges a short-lived OTC (from Odoo OAuth callback redirect) for access and refresh tokens
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
code string <span class="param-required">required</span> One-time code issued by the OAuth callback
Responses
200 Tokens returned successfully
GET /api/v1/auth/odoo/employee/callback Odoo OAuth callback (Employee App)
Handle Odoo OAuth callback for employee app, issue JWT and redirect to frontend
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
code string optional Authorization code from Odoo
Responses
302 Redirect to EmployeeWeb dashboard or login with error

Soft-deletes the authenticated user's account with PDPA-compliant PII encryption
Responses
200 Account terminated successfully
401 Unauthorized
403 Account already terminated

User Files - Profile Images

User profile image upload and management

POST /api/v1/users/profile-images/{userId}/upload Upload profile image(s)
Upload one or more profile images with checksum-based deduplication. **Deduplication Logic:** - If file with same original name exists and checksum matches → skip (unchanged) - If file with same original name exists but checksum differs → replace - If no file with same original name → create new **Access Control:** - Users can upload to their own profile - Admins (isAdmin) can upload to any user's profile
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{userId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Target user ID
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: multipart/form-data · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
files string[] Image files (max 10, 5MB each)
Responses
201 Files uploaded successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string
└ result string
└ uploaded string[]
└ failed string[]
└ summary string
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking
400 No files provided or invalid files
401 Not authenticated
403 Not authorized to upload for this user
GET /api/v1/users/profile-images/{userId} List all profile images
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{userId} string <span class="param-required">required</span>
Responses
200 List of profile images
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string
└ files string[]
└ count string
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking
GET /api/v1/users/profile-images/{userId}/{fileName} Get profile image info
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{userId} string <span class="param-required">required</span>
{fileName} string <span class="param-required">required</span> File name (not original name)
Responses
200 File information
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string
└ file string
└ fileName string Unique file name on storage
└ originalName string Original file name from upload
└ mimeType string
└ fileSize string File size in bytes
└ checksum string MD5 checksum for deduplication
└ uploadedAt string <date-time>
└ url string Proxy URL to access the file
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking
404 File not found
DELETE /api/v1/users/profile-images/{userId}/{fileName} Delete profile image
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{userId} string <span class="param-required">required</span>
{fileName} string <span class="param-required">required</span>
Responses
200 File deleted successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string
└ deleted string
└ fileName string
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking
404 File not found

User Temporary Data

Temporary data storage for multi-step user flows

GET /api/v1/user/temp-data Get user temporary data with pagination and filtering
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string optional Page number (1-based). First page is 1. Ignored when limit=-1.
limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.
userId string optional Filter by user ID
flag string optional Filter by flag
search string optional Free-text search (split by whitespace, AND logic). Searchable fields: flag
orderField string optional Sort by field
orderSort string optional Sort order
Responses
200 User temporary data retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success] required
message string required
content string required
└ data string[]
401 Unauthorized
403 Forbidden
500 Internal server error

data string required JSON data to store
flag string required Category/flag for organization

success string
message string

└ data string required JSON data storage
└ flag string required Category/flag for organization

Notifications

Notification inbox — shared by all user roles

GET /api/v1/notifications List my notifications
Returns paginated notifications for the authenticated user. Always scoped to the caller — never returns other users' data.
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
tab string optional Filter by category. general = password/account events. task = ticket/price events. Omit for all.
sortBy string optional Sort order. unread/read also filters by read status.
page string optional Page number (1-based). First page is 1. Ignored when limit=-1.
limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.
search string optional Free-text search (split by whitespace, AND logic). Searchable fields: title, body
Responses
200 Paginated notification list
PATCH /api/v1/notifications/read-all Mark all notifications as read
Marks all unread notifications as read. Optionally scoped to a tab.
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
tab string optional Scope to a specific tab. Omit to mark all.
Responses
200 Number of notifications updated
PATCH /api/v1/notifications/{id}/read Mark a notification as read
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span>
Responses
200 Updated notification
404 Notification not found
DELETE /api/v1/notifications/{id} Delete a notification
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span>
Responses
200 Notification deleted
404 Notification not found

Customers

Customer account management

GET /api/v1/customer Get all customers
Retrieve a paginated list of all customers (Employee/Admin only)
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string optional Page number (1-based). First page is 1. Ignored when limit=-1.
limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.
search string optional Free-text search (split by whitespace, AND logic). Searchable fields: winspeedId, user.username, user.email, user.firstName, user.lastName, user.phone
orderField string optional Field to sort by
orderSort string optional Sort direction
Responses
200 Customers retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success] required
message string required
content string required
└ data string[] required Array of data items
└ pagination string required
└ page string required Current page number (always 1 when limit=-1/unlimited)
└ limit string required Items per page, or total count when unlimited (limit=-1)
└ total string required Total number of items across all pages
└ totalPages string required Total number of pages (always 1 when limit=-1/unlimited)
└ hasNext string required Whether there is a next page (always false when unlimited)
└ hasPrev string required Whether there is a previous page (always false on page 1)
401 Unauthorized
403 Forbidden
POST /api/v1/customer Create a new customer
Create a new customer record in the system
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
userId string <uuid> required ID of the associated user
winspeedId string nullable Winspeed ERP customer ID
taxId string nullable Tax identification number (legacy field)
companyName string nullable Company name (legacy field)
Responses
201 Customer created successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
id string <uuid> Customer unique identifier
userId string <uuid> Associated user ID
winspeedId string nullable Winspeed ERP customer ID
createdAt string <date-time> Creation timestamp
updatedAt string <date-time> Last update timestamp
400 Validation error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
content string nullable
└ errors string Field-level validation errors
401 Authentication required
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
403 Access forbidden
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [FORBIDDEN, AUTH_INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS, ROLE_RESTRICTION] required
409 Customer already exists
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required Error message
errorCode string required Error code identifier
content string nullable Additional error details
timestamp string <date-time> nullable
requestId string nullable
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
POST /api/v1/customer/check-email Check if email is available
Check if an email address is already used by any customer. Available to all authenticated roles.
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
email string <email> required Email address to check
includes string[] Optional array of additional tables to check for email usage
Responses
200 Email check completed
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string
message string
content string
└ available string true if email is available, false if already taken
└ foundIn string[] List of tables where email was found (only present if available is false)
400 Validation error
401 Authentication required

Customer - Profiles

Customer profile management (personal and business)

GET /api/v1/customer/profile Get personal profile
Retrieve the authenticated customer's personal profile (isPersonal = true)
Responses
200 Personal profile retrieved successfully

requestId string nullable

NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
PUT /api/v1/customer/profile Update personal profile
Update the authenticated customer's personal profile (isPersonal = true). When prefixId, firstName, or lastName are provided, the system will: 1. Fetch the prefix name from MasterDataAPI 2. Update the User model with firstName, lastName, and prefix ID 3. Construct the full name as "Prefix FirstName LastName" (e.g., "นาย John Doe") 4. Save the constructed full name to CustomerProfile.name
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
name string Full display name (will be overwritten if prefixId/firstName/lastName are provided)
prefixId string <uuid> Prefix ID from MasterDataAPI (e.g., นาย, นาง, นางสาว)
entityType string [INDIVIDUAL, LEGAL_ENTITY, BOTH] Entity type classification
firstName string First name (synced to User model)
lastName string Last name (synced to User model)
email string <email>
phone string
taxId string Tax ID (synced to User model)
dob string <date> Date of birth (synced to User model)
address string
subDistrictId string <uuid>
postalCode string
profileInfos string[] Custom profile info fields. Upsert strategy: item with `id` → update; item without `id` → create; existing records not referenced by any `id` → deleted.
Responses
200 Personal profile updated successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string nullable Response data payload
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking
401 Unauthorized
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
404 Personal profile not found

requestId string nullable

Customer - Tickets

Ticket operations for customers

GET /api/v1/customer/tickets Get customer tickets
Retrieve a paginated list of tickets for the authenticated customer
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string optional Page number (1-based). First page is 1. Ignored when limit=-1.
limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.
search string optional Free-text search (split by whitespace, AND logic). Searchable fields: subject, description, code
status string optional Filter by ticket status name
priorityId string optional Filter by priority ID
orderField string optional Field to sort by
orderSort string optional Sort direction
Responses
200 Tickets retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success] required
message string required
content string required
└ data string[] required Array of data items
└ pagination string required
└ page string required Current page number (always 1 when limit=-1/unlimited)
└ limit string required Items per page, or total count when unlimited (limit=-1)
└ total string required Total number of items across all pages
└ totalPages string required Total number of pages (always 1 when limit=-1/unlimited)
└ hasNext string required Whether there is a next page (always false when unlimited)
└ hasPrev string required Whether there is a previous page (always false on page 1)
400 Invalid query parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
content string nullable
└ errors string Field-level validation errors
401 Unauthorized
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
POST /api/v1/customer/tickets Create a new ticket
Create a new support ticket. The ticket starts at Step 1 (Start) with allowedCustomer status. Dates are calculated from system config: requestedDate defaults to now, overdueAcceptDate = requestedDate + minAcceptDay days (system-computed).
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: multipart/form-data · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
subject string nullable Freetext subject (nullable if subjectId provided)
subjectId string <uuid> Optional predefined subject ID
description string required Detailed description of the issue
priorityId string <uuid>
workflowId string <uuid> required
receiptMethodId string <uuid> Required only for Product Claim tickets (workflow.ticketType.nameEn = 'Product Claim')
requestedDate string <date-time>
customerProfile string required JSON string of customer profile object.
ticketTags string[] JSON array of ticket tag UUIDs.
ticketDetails string[] JSON array of ticket detail objects.
ticketInfos string[] JSON array of ticket info objects.
attachments string[] Optional files to attach (VIDEO, IMAGE, or FILE). Multiple supported.
Responses
201 Ticket created successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
data string
└ ticket string
└ status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
└ message string required Human-readable message describing the result
└ content string nullable Response data payload
└ errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
└ timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
└ requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking
└ attachments string[]
400 Validation error or missing workflow
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
content string nullable
└ errors string Field-level validation errors
401 Unauthorized
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required

Retrieve detailed information about a specific ticket
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Ticket ID
Responses
200 Ticket details retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string nullable Response data payload
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking

NameTypeRequiredDescription

NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required Error message
errorCode string required Error code identifier
content string nullable Additional error details
timestamp string <date-time> nullable
requestId string nullable
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
PUT /api/v1/customer/tickets/{id} Update a ticket
Update ticket details. Only allowed while the ticket is in the initial step (isStart = true). Accepts multipart/form-data to support file attachments alongside ticket data. Nested relation fields (ticketTags, ticketDetails, ticketInfos) must be sent as JSON strings. **Nested relation sync rules:** - Item with `id` → update that existing record - Item without `id` → create as new record - Existing records not referenced by any `id` in the input → deleted
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Ticket ID
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: multipart/form-data · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
subject string Ticket subject
subjectId string <uuid> nullable Ticket subject ID (null to clear)
description string Ticket description
priorityId string <uuid> Priority ID
receiptMethodId string <uuid> Receipt method ID
customerProfileId string <uuid> Customer profile ID to associate with the ticket
customerProfileProjectId string <uuid> nullable Customer profile project ID (null to clear)
ticketTags string[] JSON array of ticket tag UUIDs. Missing tags will be removed.
ticketDetails string[] JSON array of ticket detail objects. Include `id` to update an existing item; omit `id` to create a new one. Records not referenced by any `id` are deleted.
ticketInfos string[] JSON array of ticket info objects. Include `id` to update an existing item; omit `id` to create a new one. Records not referenced by any `id` are deleted.
Responses
200 Ticket updated successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string
message string
content string
└ ticket string
└ id string <uuid>
└ code string
└ subject string
└ description string
└ customerId string <uuid>
└ customer string
└ currentStatus string
└ priority string
└ workflow string
└ ticketInfos string[] Dynamic ticket metadata
└ createdAt string <date-time>
└ updatedAt string <date-time>
400 Validation error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
content string nullable
└ errors string Field-level validation errors
401 Unauthorized
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
403 Access denied
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [FORBIDDEN, AUTH_INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS, ROLE_RESTRICTION] required
404 Ticket not found
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required Error message
errorCode string required Error code identifier
content string nullable Additional error details
timestamp string <date-time> nullable
requestId string nullable
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required

Retrieve available workflow transitions for the ticket
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Ticket ID
Responses
200 Next steps retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string nullable Response data payload
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking
401 Unauthorized
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
POST /api/v1/customer/tickets/{ticketId}/costs/{costId}/respond Accept or reject a specific cost list
Called when customer approves or rejects a specific cost list sent by the employee. On success, emits a real-time Socket.IO event to the employee's web dashboard. CostStatus transitions: ALERTED → ACCEPTED or ALERTED → REJECTED
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{ticketId} string <span class="param-required">required</span>
{costId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> TicketCost ID to respond to
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
action string [ACCEPT, REJECT] required Customer's decision on the cost list
reason string Optional reason (recommended when rejecting)
Responses
200 Response recorded; costStatus updated to ACCEPTED or REJECTED
NameTypeRequiredDescription
costStatus string [ACCEPTED, REJECTED]
400 Invalid action value or cost not pending approval
403 Not the ticket owner
404 Ticket or cost not found
POST /api/v1/customer/tickets/{id}/rate-comment Rate ticket experience
Submit a rating comment for a completed ticket. Only allowed when the ticket's current status AND its workflow step both have isEnd=true (ticket is fully closed). Calling this endpoint a second time will update the existing rating (upsert).
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Ticket ID
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
stars string required Rating score from 1 (worst) to 5 (best)
comment string Optional text comment from the customer
Responses
200 Rating saved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
data string
└ comment string
└ id string
└ ticketId string
└ userId string
└ comment string
└ isRating string
└ stars string
└ createdAt string <date-time>
└ updatedAt string <date-time>
400 Validation error or ticket not yet closed
403 Not the ticket owner
404 Ticket not found
POST /api/v1/customer/tickets/{id}/complete Customer completes their ticket (normal close)
Transitions the ticket to the end-step status with flag=COMPLETE and allowedCustomer=true. **Precondition**: the ticket's current status must be `isEnd=true` within the step immediately before the end step (i.e., work is done and waiting for customer sign-off). Returns 400 if the ticket is not at that position.
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Ticket ID
Responses
200 Ticket completed successfully
400 Ticket not at the required step position or already closed
403 Not the ticket owner
404 Ticket not found
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
POST /api/v1/customer/tickets/{id}/reject Customer rejects/cancels their ticket (force close from any step)
Transitions the ticket to the end-step status with flag=REJECT and allowedCustomer=true. Allowed from any step or status — no position precondition.
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Ticket ID
Responses
200 Ticket rejected successfully
400 Ticket already closed
403 Not the ticket owner
404 Ticket not found
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required

Customer - Device Tokens

POST /api/v1/customer/device-tokens Register Expo push notification token
Call this after login to enable push notifications when offline

NameTypeRequiredDescription

platform string [ios, android] required
Responses

content string nullable Response data payload
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking

errorCode string required

500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required

Responses

status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string nullable Response data payload
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking

Employee - Profile

Employee profile and personal information

GET /api/v1/employee/profile Get employee profile
Get authenticated employee's comprehensive profile information including user data and employee-specific details (organization structure, territory, IDs, etc.)
Responses
200 Profile retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
data string
└ user string
└ id string <uuid> User ID
└ username string User username
└ email string <email> nullable User email address
└ taxId string nullable User tax ID
└ phone string nullable User phone number
└ firstName string User first name
└ lastName string User last name
└ nickName string nullable User nickname
└ imageUrl string nullable User profile image URL
└ role string [EMPLOYEE, SYSTEM_ADMIN] User role
└ status string [ACTIVE, INACTIVE, DELETED, PENDING] User account status
└ emailVerified string Email verification status
└ phoneVerified string Phone verification status
└ lastLoginAt string <date-time> nullable Last login timestamp
└ createdAt string <date-time> Account creation timestamp
└ updatedAt string <date-time> Last profile update timestamp
└ employee string nullable Employee-specific information
└ id string <uuid> Employee record ID
└ employeeId string nullable Employee ID from HR system
└ winspeedId string nullable Winspeed system employee ID
└ lineId string nullable LINE user ID for LINE integration
└ territory string nullable Sales territory assignment
└ positionId string <uuid> nullable Position ID from MasterDataAPI organization structure
└ departmentId string <uuid> nullable Department ID from MasterDataAPI organization structure
└ divisionId string <uuid> nullable Division ID from MasterDataAPI organization structure
└ isActive string Employee active status
└ requireChangePassword string Whether employee must change password on next login
└ createdAt string <date-time> Employee record creation timestamp
└ updatedAt string <date-time> Employee record update timestamp
401 Authentication required - Valid JWT token must be provided
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
403 Forbidden - This endpoint is only accessible to employees
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
404 Resource not found
NameTypeRequiredDescription

errorCode string required Error code identifier
content string nullable Additional error details
timestamp string <date-time> nullable
requestId string nullable
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required

Employee - Management

Employee records management (HR/Admin operations)

POST /api/v1/employee Create a new employee
Create a new employee user account with organization structure information. Only SYSTEM_ADMIN users can create employees. **Password auto-generation:** The initial password is generated automatically as: `@` + first 4 characters of username (first char uppercased) + first 4 characters of employeeId. Example: username `kittisak.m@lts.co.th` + employeeId `660100001` → `@Kitt6601`. The employee will be required to change their password on first login (`requireChangePassword=true`). **Profile image:** Two options (file upload takes precedence): - Upload an image binary via the `image` file field — uploaded to MinIO, proxy URL saved automatically. - Or pass an external URL via the `imageUrl` text field.
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: multipart/form-data · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
username string required Unique username for the employee
email string <email> Optional email address
firstName string required Employee's first name
lastName string required Employee's last name
nickName string Optional nickname
phone string Phone number
taxId string Tax identification number
imageUrl string <uri> External profile image URL. Ignored if an `image` file is also uploaded (file upload takes precedence).
role string [EMPLOYEE, SYSTEM_ADMIN] required Employee role
isAdmin string Grant admin privileges (elevates permissions beyond role)
employeeId string Employee ID from HR system (first 4 chars used in auto-generated password)
winspeedId string Winspeed system employee ID
lineId string LINE user ID for LINE integration
positionId string <uuid> Position ID from MasterDataAPI organization structure
departmentId string <uuid> Department ID from MasterDataAPI organization structure
divisionId string <uuid> Division ID from MasterDataAPI organization structure
image string <binary> Optional profile image file (JPEG, PNG, WebP — max 5MB). Uploaded to MinIO and saved as imageUrl on the user account.
Responses
201 Employee created successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
data string
└ employee string
└ id string <uuid>
└ userId string <uuid>
└ employeeId string nullable
└ winspeedId string nullable
└ territory string nullable
└ isActive string
└ requireChangePassword string Always true on creation — employee must change password on first login
└ positionId string nullable
└ departmentId string nullable
└ divisionId string nullable
└ createdAt string <date-time>
└ updatedAt string <date-time>
└ user string
400 Validation error - Invalid input data or file type
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
401 Authentication required - Valid JWT token must be provided
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
403 Only system administrators can create employees
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
GET /api/v1/employee/employees Get all employees
Retrieve a paginated list of all employees (EMPLOYEE and SYSTEM_ADMIN users)
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string optional Page number (1-based). First page is 1. Ignored when limit=-1.
limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.
search string optional Free-text search (split by whitespace, AND logic). Searchable fields: user.username, user.email, user.firstName, user.lastName, user.phone, employeeId
isAdmin string optional Filter by admin flag (true = SYSTEM_ADMIN elevated, false = regular employee)
isActive string optional Filter by active status (true = ACTIVE, false = INACTIVE)
departmentId string optional Filter by department code (from MasterDataAPI)
divisionId string optional Filter by division code (from MasterDataAPI)
positionId string optional Filter by position code (from MasterDataAPI)
orderField string optional Field to sort by. Org fields (division/department/position) sort by sortNo from MasterDataAPI.
orderSort string optional Sort direction
Responses
200 Employee list retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success] required
message string required
content string required
└ data string[] required Array of data items
└ pagination string required
└ page string required Current page number (always 1 when limit=-1/unlimited)
└ limit string required Items per page, or total count when unlimited (limit=-1)
└ total string required Total number of items across all pages
└ totalPages string required Total number of pages (always 1 when limit=-1/unlimited)
└ hasNext string required Whether there is a next page (always false when unlimited)
└ hasPrev string required Whether there is a previous page (always false on page 1)
400 Invalid query parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
content string nullable
└ errors string Field-level validation errors
401 Authentication required
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
403 Admin access required
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [FORBIDDEN, AUTH_INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS, ROLE_RESTRICTION] required
500 Server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required

Returns ticket status distribution, trend over time, and KPI metrics. Supports filtering by date range, status, and customer name.

NameTypeRequiredDescription
