Employee - Tickets

Ticket operations for employees

GET /api/v1/employee/tickets Get all tickets with full access
Retrieve a paginated list of all tickets with comprehensive filtering options. Admins and employees have full access to all tickets regardless of customer ownership.
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string optional Page number (1-based). First page is 1. Ignored when limit=-1.
limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.
search string optional Free-text search (split by whitespace, AND logic). Searchable fields: subject, description, code
statusIds string[] optional Filter by workflow step status IDs (array of UUIDs, e.g. ?statusIds=uuid1&statusIds=uuid2)
tagIds string[] optional Filter by ticket tag IDs (array of UUIDs, e.g. ?tagIds=uuid1&tagIds=uuid2)
priorityId string optional Filter by priority ID
customerId string optional Filter by customer ID
assignedToId string optional Filter by assigned employee userId (user uuid)
employeeId string optional Filter by assigned employee ID (employee uuid)
ticketTypeId string optional Filter by ticket type ID
dateFrom string optional Filter tickets created from this date
dateTo string optional Filter tickets created until this date
subject string optional Filter by ticket subject text (partial match)
subjectId string optional Filter by exact ticket subject ID
customer string optional Filter by customer name (partial match on first name, last name, or full name)
code string optional Filter by ticket code (partial match)
productTypeId string optional Filter tickets that have at least one detail line with this product type ID
productGroupId string optional Filter tickets that have at least one detail line with this product group ID. If both productTypeId and productGroupId are provided, a single detail line must match both.
hasCost string optional Filter by cost status. 'NO_COST' returns tickets with costStatus = NO_COST; any other value (e.g. 'HAS_COST') returns tickets where costStatus != NO_COST.
overdueStatus string optional Filter by overdue status (single value).
orderField string optional Field to sort by (supports custom fields: customerProfile, priority, currentStatus, ticketAssignment that map to nested relations)
orderSort string optional Sort direction
Responses
200 Tickets retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success] required
message string required
content string required
└ data string[]
401 Authentication required - Valid JWT token must be provided
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
403 Access denied - User does not have sufficient permissions
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [FORBIDDEN, AUTH_INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS, ROLE_RESTRICTION] required
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
POST /api/v1/employee/tickets Create ticket on behalf of customer (phone call support)
Allows employees to create tickets for customers who call the office. Supports creating new customer records if the customer hasn't registered yet. When a customer later registers with a matching email, the system will link them to their existing customer record. **Important**: Employee-created tickets skip Step 1 (Start: Request) and begin at Step 2 (Inspect Progress: Request Accepted), because the employee has already "received" the request via phone call.
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: multipart/form-data · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
subject string Freetext subject (required if subjectId not provided)
subjectId string <uuid>
description string required
priorityId string <uuid> required
workflowId string <uuid> required
receiptMethodId string <uuid> Required only for Product Claim tickets (workflow.ticketType.nameEn = 'Product Claim')
customerId string <uuid> Existing customer ID. If omitted, a new customer is created from customerProfile data.
requestedDate string <date-time>
acceptedDate string <date-time>
overdueReviewDate string <date-time> Override the overdue review deadline. Defaults to acceptedDate + estimateReviewDay from config.
customerProfile string required JSON string of customer profile object. New customer: {"email":"x@x.com","firstName":"John","lastName":"Doe","phone":"0812345678"} Existing customer: {"customerProfileId":"uuid","winspeedId":"WS-001"}
ticketTags string[] JSON array of ticket tag UUIDs.
ticketDetails string[] JSON array of ticket detail objects.
ticketInfos string[] JSON array of ticket info objects.
attachments string[] Optional files to attach (VIDEO, IMAGE, or FILE). Multiple supported.
Responses
201 Ticket created successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
data string
└ ticket string
└ id string <uuid>
└ code string
└ subject string
└ description string
└ customer string
└ id string <uuid>
└ isNewCustomer string
└ needsRegistration string
└ email string <email>
└ winspeedId string Winspeed customer ID if provided
└ customerProfile string
└ id string <uuid>
└ name string
└ isPersonal string
└ isDefault string
└ attachments string[]
400 Validation failed
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
content string nullable
└ errors string Field-level validation errors
401 Authentication required - Valid JWT token must be provided
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
403 Access denied - User does not have sufficient permissions
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [FORBIDDEN, AUTH_INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS, ROLE_RESTRICTION] required
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required

PUT /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id} Update ticket details
Update ticket information. This does not change workflow status - use update-status endpoint for that.
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span>
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

title string
description string

DELETE /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id} Delete a ticket
Permanently delete a ticket. Only SYSTEM_ADMIN and EMPLOYEE roles can delete tickets.
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span>
Responses
200 Ticket deleted successfully
401 Authentication required - Valid JWT token must be provided
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
403 Only admins can delete tickets

NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required Error message
errorCode string required Error code identifier
content string nullable Additional error details
timestamp string <date-time> nullable
requestId string nullable
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
GET /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id}/next-status Get next available statuses for a ticket
Get the next available statuses for a ticket based on the current status and workflow step. Business logic: - If current status isEnd = false: Returns statuses in SAME step where allowedEmployee = true (excludes current status) - If current status isEnd = true: Gets next step (current step sortNo + 1) - If next step exists: Returns statuses in next step where allowedEmployee = true - If no next step: Returns empty array (final step reached) Results are sorted by sortNo ascending.
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Ticket ID
Responses
200 Next statuses retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
data string
└ currentStatus string
└ id string <uuid>
└ nameTh string
└ nameEn string
└ publicNameTh string
└ publicNameEn string
└ isEnd string
└ sortNo string
└ currentStep string
└ id string <uuid>
└ nameTh string
└ nameEn string
└ sortNo string
└ isEnd string
└ nextStatuses string[]
401 Authentication required - Valid JWT token must be provided
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
404 Ticket not found
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
GET /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id}/reject-status Get the REJECT end-step status for a ticket's workflow
Returns the TicketStepStatus with flag=REJECT in the workflow's end step. Use this to get the targetStatusId when force-closing (rejecting) a ticket via POST /update-status.
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Ticket ID
Responses
200 Reject status retrieved successfully
404 Ticket not found or no REJECT status in workflow
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
POST /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id}/update-status Update ticket status with comprehensive workflow validation
Update a ticket's status with full validation and related data creation. Validation rules: - Target status must have allowedEmployee = true - Validates requireComment, requireAttachment, requireAppointment, requireInternalComment - comment is required when isInternal = true or files are attached - When requireInternalComment = true, comment must be provided with isInternal = true - overdueCompleteDate can only be provided when the ticket already has a system-stamped overdueCompleteDate (not null) Creates: - TicketHistory record - Updates Ticket.currentStatusId - Optional comment (internal if isInternal = true, visible to customer otherwise) - Optional attachments linked to the comment - Optional ticket details (isFromRequest configurable via body, defaults to false) - Optional ticket costs - Optional employee assignments
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Ticket ID
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: multipart/form-data · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
targetStatusId string <uuid> required Target status ID to transition to
comment string Comment text; required when isInternal = true or files are attached (required if requireComment = true or requireInternalComment = true with isInternal = true)
isInternal string If true, the comment is internal (visible to employees only); requires comment to be provided
scheduledAt string <date-time> Appointment date (required if requireAppointment = true)
assignments string[] JSON array of employee assignment objects.
ticketDetails string[] JSON array of ticket detail objects.
ticketCosts string[] JSON array of ticket cost objects.
ticketInfos string[] JSON array of ticket info objects.
overdueCompleteDate string <date-time> Override the system-stamped overdue complete date. Only allowed when the ticket already has an overdueCompleteDate set by the system (i.e., it is not null). Submitting this when the field has not yet been stamped will return a 400 error.
priorityId string <uuid> Optional priority ID to update the ticket's priority
attachments string[] Files to attach to the comment (VIDEO, IMAGE, or FILE — max 12 total, required if requireAttachment = true)
Responses
200 Ticket status updated successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
data string
└ ticketHistoryId string <uuid>
└ status string
└ id string <uuid>
└ nameTh string
└ nameEn string
└ isEnd string
400 Validation error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
403 Forbidden - Status not allowed for employees
404 Ticket or status not found
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
POST /api/v1/employee/tickets/{id}/attachments Upload ticket-level attachments
Upload one or more files and attach them to a ticket (not linked to any comment). Supports VIDEO, IMAGE, and FILE types. Use the field name `attachments` for all files.
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Ticket ID
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: multipart/form-data · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
attachments string[] required Files to upload (VIDEO, IMAGE, or FILE). Multiple files supported.
Responses
201 Attachments uploaded successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
data string
└ attachments string[]
400 Validation failed
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required

errorCode string required

message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
500 Internal server error

errorCode string required

GET /api/v1/employee/workflows Get all workflows
Retrieve all workflows with their associated ticket types and workflow steps. Each workflow defines a process flow for handling specific types of tickets.

NameTypeRequiredDescription

limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.

orderSort string optional Sort direction

Employee - Customers

Customer management operations for employees

GET /api/v1/employee/customers Get all customers
Retrieve a paginated list of all customers with optional search and filtering. Profile-based filters (name, email, phone) search on the personal profile (isPersonal=true). Soft-deleted customers are excluded by default.
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string optional Page number (1-based). First page is 1. Ignored when limit=-1.
limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.
search string optional Free-text search (split by whitespace, AND logic). Searchable fields: personal profile name, email, phone, and winspeedId
customerId string optional Filter by exact customer ID
name string optional Filter by personal profile name (partial match, case-insensitive)
email string optional Filter by personal profile email (partial match, case-insensitive)
phone string optional Filter by personal profile phone (partial match, case-insensitive)
status string optional Filter by user status. Customers without a user account are excluded when this filter is applied.
dateFrom string optional Filter by creation date (from, inclusive)
dateTo string optional Filter by creation date (to, inclusive)
orderField string optional Field to sort by. Name, email, and phone sort by personal profile fields.
orderSort string optional Sort direction
Responses
200 Customer list retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success] required
message string required
content string required
└ data string[]
400 Invalid query parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
content string nullable
└ errors string Field-level validation errors
401 Authentication required
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
403 Admin access required
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [FORBIDDEN, AUTH_INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS, ROLE_RESTRICTION] required
500 Server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required

page string optional Page number (1-based). First page is 1. Ignored when limit=-1.
limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.
search string optional Free-text search (split by whitespace, AND logic). Searchable fields: name, email, phone, taxId
isDefault string optional Filter by default project status
orderField string optional Field to order by
orderSort string optional Sort direction
Responses
200 Customer profile projects retrieved successfully

Employee - Password Reset

Employee password reset request management

POST /api/v1/employee/password-reset/request Request a password reset
Submit a password reset request for a forgotten password. This endpoint is public (no authentication required) — use it when you cannot log in. Always returns 201 regardless of whether the username exists, to prevent account enumeration. If a valid active employee/system admin account is found, a pending reset request is created and admins are notified to approve or reject it.
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
username string required The username of the account requesting a password reset
Responses
201 Password reset request processed
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string
message string
content object nullable
429 Too many requests — rate limit exceeded
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required Error message
errorCode string required Error code identifier
content string nullable Additional error details
timestamp string <date-time> nullable
requestId string nullable
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
POST /api/v1/employee/password-reset/{id}/respond Approve or reject a password reset request
Respond to a pending password reset request. Only SYSTEM_ADMIN users can perform this action. Any employee or system admin (including other admins) can submit a password reset request, and this endpoint is used to approve or reject it. If approved, the user's password will be reset to a default password and they will be required to change it on next login. If rejected, the request is simply marked as rejected.
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Password reset request ID
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
approved string required Whether to approve (true) or reject (false) the request
Responses
200 Password reset request responded to successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string
message string
content string
└ request string
└ id string <uuid>
└ userId string <uuid>
└ employeeId string <uuid> nullable
└ requestedAt string <date-time>
└ requestedBy string <uuid>
└ respondedAt string <date-time>
└ respondedBy string <uuid>
└ status string [PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED]
└ user string
└ employee string nullable
└ requestedByUser string
└ respondedByUser string
└ createdAt string <date-time>
└ updatedAt string <date-time>

errorCode string required
PUT /api/v1/ticket/{id} Update ticket
Update ticket information. All fields are optional. **Nested relation sync rules (ticketTags, ticketDetails, ticketInfos):** - Item with `id` → update that existing record - Item without `id` → create as new record - Existing records not referenced by any `id` in the input → deleted
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Ticket ID
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
subject string Ticket subject
subjectId string <uuid> nullable Predefined subject ID
description string Ticket description
priorityId string <uuid> Priority ID
receiptMethodId string <uuid> Receipt method ID
currentStatusId string <uuid> Workflow status ID (for status transitions)
ticketTags string[] JSON array of ticket tag UUIDs. Missing tags will be removed.
ticketDetails string[] JSON array of ticket detail objects. Include `id` to update an existing item; omit `id` to create a new one. Records not referenced by any `id` are deleted.
ticketInfos string[] JSON array of ticket info objects. Include `id` to update an existing item; omit `id` to create a new one. Records not referenced by any `id` are deleted.
Responses
200 Ticket updated successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string
message string
content string
└ ticket string
└ id string <uuid>
└ code string
└ subject string
└ description string
└ customerId string <uuid>
└ customer string
└ currentStatus string
└ priority string
└ workflow string
└ ticketInfos string[] Dynamic ticket metadata
└ createdAt string <date-time>
└ updatedAt string <date-time>
400 Validation error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
content string nullable
└ errors string Field-level validation errors

GET /api/v1/ticket/{id}/costs Get ticket costs
Returns all non-deleted TicketCost records for a ticket, each with their non-deleted detail line items and individual totals, plus a computed grandTotal. Accessible to any authenticated user who has access to the ticket (Customer, Employee, SystemAdmin).
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Ticket ID
Responses
200 Ticket costs retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
ticket string
└ id string <uuid>
└ code string
└ subject string
└ costStatus string [NO_COST, ALERTED, ACCEPTED, REJECTED]
└ updatedAt string <date-time>
ticketCosts string
└ costs string[]
└ grandTotal string Sum of all active TicketCost totals (Decimal as string)
└ count string
401 Authentication required
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
403 Access forbidden
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [FORBIDDEN, AUTH_INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS, ROLE_RESTRICTION] required
404 Ticket not found
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required Error message
errorCode string required Error code identifier
content string nullable Additional error details
timestamp string <date-time> nullable
requestId string nullable
POST /api/v1/ticket/{id}/close Force-close a ticket
Force-closes a ticket for any authenticated role (Employee, SystemAdmin, Customer). Stamps `closedDate` and transitions `currentStatus` to an end-step status. **Auto-detect logic (when `statusId` is omitted):** - **Employee / SystemAdmin** → first status in the end step with `allowedEmployee=true` (ordered by `sortNo`) - **Customer** → - If ticket's current status has `isEnd=true` within the semi-last step (step before the end step): uses the **1st** customer-allowed status in the end step (normal close / completed) - Otherwise: uses the **2nd** customer-allowed status in the end step (force close / cancelled); returns 400 if no second status exists in the workflow
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Ticket ID
Request Body

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
statusId string <uuid> Optional. Specific end-step status ID to close to. Must belong to an end step (`TicketStep.isEnd=true`) of this ticket's workflow. If omitted, the status is auto-detected based on the caller's role.
Responses
200 Ticket closed successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string
message string
content string
└ ticket string
└ id string <uuid>
└ code string
└ subject string
└ description string
└ customerId string <uuid>
└ customer string
└ currentStatus string
└ priority string
└ workflow string
└ ticketInfos string[] Dynamic ticket metadata
└ createdAt string <date-time>
└ updatedAt string <date-time>
400 Invalid statusId or no suitable close status found in workflow
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
content string nullable
└ errors string Field-level validation errors
401 Authentication required
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
403 Customer attempting to close a ticket they do not own
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [FORBIDDEN, AUTH_INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS, ROLE_RESTRICTION] required
404 Ticket not found
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required Error message
errorCode string required Error code identifier
content string nullable Additional error details
timestamp string <date-time> nullable
requestId string nullable
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
GET /api/v1/ticket/{id}/comments Get all comments for a ticket
Retrieve all comments for a specific ticket with user information and attachment count
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Ticket ID
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string optional Page number (1-based). First page is 1. Ignored when limit=-1.
limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.
search string optional No searchable fields for this endpoint. Search term is ignored.
orderField string optional Field to sort by
orderSort string optional Sort direction
Responses
200 Comments retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string
message string
content string
└ data string[]
└ pagination string
└ page string Current page number (always 1 when limit=-1/unlimited)
└ limit string Items per page, or total count when unlimited (limit=-1)
└ total string Total number of items across all pages
└ totalPages string Total number of pages (always 1 when limit=-1/unlimited)
└ hasNext string Whether there is a next page (always false when unlimited)
└ hasPrev string Whether there is a previous page (always false on page 1)
401 Authentication required
404 Ticket not found
500 Internal server error
POST /api/v1/ticket/{id}/comments Add comment to ticket
Add a new comment to an existing ticket. Optionally attach files (VIDEO, IMAGE, or FILE) in the same request. **Role behaviour for `isInternal`:** - `EMPLOYEE` / `SYSTEM_ADMIN`: `isInternal=true` marks the comment as internal (hidden from customer) - `CUSTOMER`: `isInternal` is ignored — the comment is always public
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Ticket ID
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: multipart/form-data · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
comment string required Comment text content
isInternal string Mark as internal (employee/admin only — ignored for customer role) (default: false)
attachments string[] Optional files to attach (VIDEO, IMAGE, or FILE). Multiple files supported.
Responses
201 Comment added successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string
message string
content string
└ id string <uuid>
└ ticketId string <uuid>
└ userId string <uuid>
└ comment string
└ isInternal string
└ isRating string Whether this comment is a rating review from customer
└ stars string nullable Rating score 1-5, only set when isRating is true
└ createdAt string <date-time>
└ updatedAt string <date-time>
└ attachments object[]
400 Validation error (missing comment, invalid file type, file too large)
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
content string nullable
└ errors string Field-level validation errors

PUT /api/v1/ticket/{id}/comments/{commentId} Edit a comment (text only)
Update the text of an existing comment. Only the comment author (EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role) may edit their own comment. Customer-authored comments cannot be edited. Attachments are not managed here.

400 Validation error

NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
DELETE /api/v1/ticket/{id}/comments/{commentId} Soft-delete a comment (unsent)
Stamp `deletedAt` on the comment. The record is retained but content and attachments are hidden in subsequent GET responses. Only the comment author (EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN) may unsend their own comment. Customer-authored comments cannot be deleted.

404 Ticket or comment not found

message string required
errorCode string required

└ total string required Total number of items across all pages
└ totalPages string required Total number of pages (always 1 when limit=-1/unlimited)
└ hasNext string required Whether there is a next page (always false when unlimited)
└ hasPrev string required Whether there is a previous page (always false on page 1)
500 Internal server error

Workflows

Workflow definition and management

GET /api/v1/workflows Get all workflows
Retrieve a paginated list of workflows with filtering (public access)
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string optional Page number (1-based). First page is 1. Ignored when limit=-1.
limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.
ticketTypeId string optional Filter by ticket type
search string optional Free-text search (split by whitespace, AND logic). Searchable fields: nameTh, nameEn, description
isActive string optional Filter by active status
orderField string optional Field to sort by
orderSort string optional Sort direction
Responses
200 Workflows retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success] required
message string required
content string required
└ data string[]
500 Internal server error
POST /api/v1/workflows Create a new workflow
Create a new workflow with auto-versioning (requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role)
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
name string required Workflow name
description string Workflow description
ticketTypeId string <uuid> required Associated ticket type ID
version string Workflow version (auto-incremented if not provided)
isActive string Active status (default: true)
isDefault string Default workflow for ticket type (default: false)
Responses
201 Workflow created successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
data string
└ workflow string
└ id string <uuid> Workflow unique identifier
└ nameTh string Workflow name in Thai
└ nameEn string Workflow name in English
└ description string nullable Workflow description
└ ticketTypeId string <uuid> Associated ticket type ID
└ version string Workflow version number
└ isActive string Whether the workflow is active
└ isDefault string Whether this is the default workflow for the ticket type
└ createdAt string <date-time> Creation timestamp
└ updatedAt string <date-time> Last update timestamp
400 Validation error
401 Authentication required
403 Access forbidden - requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role
500 Internal server error
GET /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId} Get workflow by ID
Retrieve detailed workflow information with full step hierarchy (public access)
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{workflowId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Workflow ID
Responses
200 Workflow retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
data string
└ workflow string
└ id string <uuid> Workflow unique identifier
└ nameTh string Workflow name in Thai
└ nameEn string Workflow name in English
└ description string nullable Workflow description
└ ticketTypeId string <uuid> Associated ticket type ID
└ version string Workflow version number
└ isActive string Whether the workflow is active
└ isDefault string Whether this is the default workflow for the ticket type
└ createdAt string <date-time> Creation timestamp
└ updatedAt string <date-time> Last update timestamp
404 Workflow not found
500 Internal server error

Update an existing workflow (requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role)
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{workflowId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Workflow ID
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
name string
description string
isActive string
isDefault string
Responses
200 Workflow updated successfully
400 Validation error
401 Authentication required
403 Access forbidden - requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role
404 Workflow not found
500 Internal server error
DELETE /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId} Delete workflow
Delete a workflow (requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role). Protected against deletion if workflow has tickets or is default.

NameTypeRequiredDescription
{workflowId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Workflow ID
Responses
200 Workflow deleted successfully
400 Cannot delete workflow (has tickets or is default)

403 Access forbidden - requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role
404 Workflow not found

Activate a workflow and optionally set as default (requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role)

NameTypeRequiredDescription
{workflowId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Workflow ID
Request Body

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription

Responses

401 Authentication required
403 Access forbidden - requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role

Workflow Steps

Workflow step configuration

GET /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps Get all steps for a workflow
Retrieve all ticket steps for a specific workflow (public access)
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{workflowId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Workflow ID
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string optional Page number (1-based). First page is 1. Ignored when limit=-1.
limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.
search string optional Free-text search (split by whitespace, AND logic). Searchable fields: nameTh, nameEn
orderField string optional Field to sort by
orderSort string optional Sort direction
Responses
200 Workflow steps retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
data string[]
404 Workflow not found

POST /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps Create a new step
Create a new ticket step for a workflow (requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role)
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{workflowId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Workflow ID
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
nameTh string required Step name in Thai
nameEn string required Step name in English
sortNo string required Sort order (display sequence)
isStart string Is this the initial step (default: false)
isEnd string Is this the final step (default: false)
canDelete string Can this step be deleted (default: true)
color string nullable RGBA color code (e.g. rgba(255, 0, 0, 1))
Responses
201 Ticket step created successfully
400 Validation error
401 Authentication required
403 Access forbidden - requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role
404 Workflow not found
500 Internal server error
GET /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/{stepId} Get step by ID
Retrieve a specific ticket step within a workflow (public access)

NameTypeRequiredDescription
{workflowId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Workflow ID
{stepId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Step ID
Responses
200 Ticket step retrieved successfully
404 Workflow or step not found
500 Internal server error
PUT /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/{stepId} Update step
Update an existing ticket step (requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role)
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{workflowId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Workflow ID
{stepId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Step ID
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
nameTh string Step name in Thai
nameEn string Step name in English
sortNo string
isStart string
isEnd string
canDelete string
color string nullable RGBA color code (e.g. rgba(255, 0, 0, 1))
Responses
200 Ticket step updated successfully
400 Validation error
401 Authentication required
403 Access forbidden - requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role
404 Workflow or step not found
500 Internal server error
DELETE /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/{stepId} Delete step
Delete a ticket step (requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role)
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{workflowId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Workflow ID
{stepId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Step ID
Responses
200 Ticket step deleted successfully
401 Authentication required
403 Access forbidden - requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role
404 Workflow or step not found
500 Internal server error
POST /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/reorder Reorder steps
Reorder ticket steps within a workflow (requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role)
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{workflowId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Workflow ID
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
stepIds string[] required Array of step IDs in desired order
Responses
200 Ticket steps reordered successfully
400 Validation error
401 Authentication required
403 Access forbidden - requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role
404 Workflow not found
500 Internal server error

Workflow Step Statuses

Status configuration per workflow step

GET /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/{stepId}/statuses Get all statuses for a step
Retrieve all ticket step statuses for a specific step (public access)
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{workflowId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Workflow ID
{stepId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Step ID
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string optional Page number (1-based). First page is 1. Ignored when limit=-1.
limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.
search string optional Free-text search (split by whitespace, AND logic). Searchable fields: nameTh, nameEn, publicNameTh, publicNameEn
orderField string optional Field to sort by
orderSort string optional Sort direction
Responses
200 Ticket step statuses retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success] required
message string required
content string required
└ data string[]
404 Workflow or step not found
500 Internal server error
POST /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/{stepId}/statuses Create a new status
Create a new ticket step status (requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role)
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{workflowId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Workflow ID
{stepId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Step ID
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
nameTh string required Internal status name in Thai (Staff View)
nameEn string required Internal status name in English (Staff View)
publicNameTh string required Public-facing status name in Thai (Customer View)
publicNameEn string required Public-facing status name in English (Customer View)
sortNo string required Sort order (display sequence)
requireComment string Require comment when transitioning to this status (default: false)
requireAttachment string Require attachment when transitioning to this status (default: false)
requireAppointment string Require appointment when transitioning to this status (default: false)
requireInternalComment string Require internal comment when transitioning to this status (default: false)
allowedCustomer string Allow customers to transition to this status (default: true)
allowedEmployee string Allow employees to transition to this status (default: true)
allowedSystem string Allow system to transition to this status (default: false)
isEnd string Is this a final/closing status within the step (default: false)
Responses
201 Ticket step status created successfully
400 Validation error
401 Authentication required
403 Access forbidden - requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role
404 Workflow or step not found
500 Internal server error
GET /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/{stepId}/statuses/{statusId} Get status by ID
Retrieve a specific ticket step status (public access)
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{workflowId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Workflow ID
{stepId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Step ID
{statusId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Status ID
Responses
200 Ticket step status retrieved successfully
404 Workflow, step, or status not found
500 Internal server error
PUT /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/{stepId}/statuses/{statusId} Update status
Update an existing ticket step status (requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role)
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{workflowId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Workflow ID
{stepId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Step ID
{statusId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Status ID
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
nameTh string Internal status name in Thai
nameEn string Internal status name in English
publicNameTh string Public-facing status name in Thai
publicNameEn string Public-facing status name in English
sortNo string
requireComment string
requireAttachment string
requireAppointment string
requireInternalComment string
allowedCustomer string
allowedEmployee string
allowedSystem string
isEnd string
Responses
200 Ticket step status updated successfully
400 Validation error
401 Authentication required
403 Access forbidden - requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role
404 Workflow, step, or status not found
500 Internal server error
DELETE /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/steps/{stepId}/statuses/{statusId} Delete status
Delete a ticket step status (requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role)
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{workflowId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Workflow ID

Responses

403 Access forbidden - requires EMPLOYEE or SYSTEM_ADMIN role
404 Workflow, step, or status not found

Approvals

Approval request operations for approvers

GET /api/v1/approval List all approval requests (history) with filters and pagination
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string optional Page number (1-based). First page is 1. Ignored when limit=-1.
limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.
search string optional Free-text search (split by whitespace, AND logic). Searchable fields: code, ticket.code, ticket.subject
orderField string optional Field to sort by (custom fields map to nested Prisma relations)
orderSort string optional Sort direction
ticketCode string optional
subject string optional
subjectId string optional
ticketTypeId string optional
customer string optional
status string optional
startDate string optional
endDate string optional
Responses
200 Paginated list of approval requests
401 Unauthorized
POST /api/v1/approval Manually trigger an approval request (SystemAdmin/system use)
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
ticketId string required
approvalRuleId string required
items string[] required
Responses
201 Approval request created
400 Validation error
GET /api/v1/approval/ticket/{ticketId} List all approval requests for a ticket (all statuses)
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{ticketId} string <span class="param-required">required</span>
Responses
200 Approval requests for the ticket
GET /api/v1/approval/{id} Get approval request detail
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span>
Responses
200 Approval request detail
404 Not found
POST /api/v1/approval/{id} Respond to an approval request (approve/reject items)
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span>
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
items string[] required
comment string
Responses
200 Approval response recorded
400 Validation error or unauthorized
POST /api/v1/approval/{id}/duplicate Duplicate an approval request for editing
Creates a new approval request from an existing one. If the original is PENDING, its PENDING items and the request itself are CANCELLED first. If the original is APPROVED or REJECTED it is kept as history and the new one is created alongside. COMPLETED or CANCELLED requests cannot be duplicated.
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span>
Responses
201 New approval request created
400 Cannot duplicate a CANCELLED request
403 Cannot duplicate a COMPLETED request
404 Request not found
POST /api/v1/approval/{id}/complete Mark an approval request as COMPLETED (locks editing)
Manually marks a request as COMPLETED. Only allowed when the current status is APPROVED or REJECTED. Once COMPLETED, duplicate-to-edit is no longer allowed.
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span>
Responses
200 Request marked as COMPLETED
400 Request is not APPROVED or REJECTED
404 Request not found
GET /api/v1/approval/{id}/authorize Check if the current JWT user is authorized to respond to this approval
Returns 200 with rule, currentLevel, and matched conditions when authorized. Returns 403 with reason and available conditions when not authorized.
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span>
Responses
200 User is authorized - returns rule, currentLevel, matched conditions
403 Not authorized - returns reason and available conditions
404 Request not found

Responses

401 Unauthorized

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription

description string nullable

canEditItemQty string
isActive string

Responses

NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span>
Responses
200 Rule deleted
404 Not found

Attachments

File upload and attachment management

POST /api/v1/attachments/upload Upload ticket attachment(s)
Upload one or more files to a ticket (max 2 videos, max 10 files, max 12 total)
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: multipart/form-data · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
ticketId string required The ID of the ticket
attachments string[] required Files to upload (videos max 50MB, files max 10MB)
Responses

400 Invalid request or validation error
401 Unauthorized
500 Internal server error

NameTypeRequiredDescription

Responses

401 Unauthorized
404 Attachment not found or access denied
500 Internal server error

NameTypeRequiredDescription

Responses

NameTypeRequiredDescription
{ticketId} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Ticket ID
Responses
200 Ticket attachments retrieved
401 Unauthorized

500 Internal server error

Master Data - Address

Address reference data (country, province, district, sub-district)

GET /api/v1/data/address/search Search addresses with language support
Search sub-districts with full address hierarchy and computed full address fields
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string optional Page number (1-based). First page is 1. Ignored when limit=-1.
limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.
query string optional Free-text search (split by whitespace, AND logic). Searchable fields: nameTh, nameEn
postalCode string optional Filter by postal code
lang string optional Language for response content
orderField string optional Field to sort by
orderSort string optional Sort direction
fresh string optional If true, ignore cache and fetch fresh data from database
Responses
200 Addresses retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success] required
message string required
content string required
└ data string[]
401 Unauthorized
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required Error message
errorCode string required Error code identifier
content string nullable Additional error details
timestamp string <date-time> nullable
requestId string nullable

NameTypeRequiredDescription

message string required Error message
errorCode string required Error code identifier
content string nullable Additional error details
timestamp string <date-time> nullable
requestId string nullable

NameTypeRequiredDescription

isActive string optional Filter by active status
orderField string optional Field to sort by
orderSort string optional Sort direction

Master Data - Organization

Organization structure data (division, department, position)

GET /api/v1/data/organization/division Get all divisions with pagination
Retrieve a paginated list of all divisions
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string optional Page number (1-based). First page is 1. Ignored when limit=-1.
limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.
search string optional Free-text search (split by whitespace, AND logic). Searchable fields: code, nameTh, nameEn
isActive string optional Filter by active status
orderField string optional Field to sort by
orderSort string optional Sort direction
Responses
200 Divisions retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string nullable Response data payload
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp

NameTypeRequiredDescription

status string [success, error] required Response status indicator

errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking
401 Unauthorized
500 Internal server error

isActive string Whether the prefix is active

Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription

search string optional Free-text search (split by whitespace, AND logic). Searchable fields: filename
Responses
200 Files retrieved successfully

External Data - Winspeed

Winspeed ERP integration endpoints

GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/customers/customer Get list of customers
Retrieve a list of customers from Winspeed
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string optional Page number (1-based). First page is 1. Ignored when limit=-1.
limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.
search string optional Search term for customer details including contact details
groupid string optional Customer group ID
custype string optional Customer type (1=Company, 2=Person)
typeid string optional Customer type ID
branchid string optional Branch ID
vatid string optional VAT group ID
status string optional Customer status (A=Active, I=Inactive, H=Hold)
custid string optional Customer ID
orderField string optional Field to order by
orderSort string optional Sort direction
Responses
200 Customers retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string nullable Response data payload
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking
401 Unauthorized
500 Internal server error

GET /api/v1/external-data/winspeed/vendors/vendor Get vendors
Retrieve a list of vendors from Winspeed
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string optional Page number (1-based). First page is 1. Ignored when limit=-1.
limit string optional Items per page (1-100). Use -1 to return all results on a single page.
search string optional Search term
groupid string optional Group ID
vendortype string optional Vendor type (1=Company, 2=Person)
typeid string optional Type ID
status string optional Status
orderField string optional Field to order by
orderSort string optional Sort direction

200 Vendors retrieved successfully

message string required Human-readable message describing the result

requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking

MinIO Proxy

MinIO object storage proxy endpoints

POST /api/v1/minio/presign/{bucket}/{objectPath} Generate a presigned proxy URL
Generates a short-lived presigned URL for the MinIO proxy that does **not** require an `Authorization` header. Use this for cross-platform scenarios where setting headers is not possible: - React Native `<Image>` and `<Video>` components - Native iOS `AVPlayer` / `WKWebView` media loading - Cached image libraries (FastImage, etc.) **Flow:** 1. Call this endpoint with your JWT Bearer token to get a presigned URL. 2. Use the returned `url` directly as `source.uri` in React Native or as an `<img src>` / `<video src>` — no `Authorization` header needed. **Security:** - Requires JWT authentication to issue the token. - Permission check (ownership / staff access) runs at issuance time. - Token is HMAC-signed and scoped to the exact bucket + object path. - Token TTL is configurable via `MINIO_PRESIGN_TTL` (default: 900 s / 15 min).
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{bucket} string <span class="param-required">required</span> MinIO bucket name
{objectPath} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Full object path within the bucket (e.g. `userId/fileName.jpg`)
Responses
200 Presigned URL generated successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string
content string
└ url string Proxy URL with embedded signed token (no Authorization header needed)
└ expiresAt string <date-time> ISO 8601 timestamp when the token expires
└ ttl string Token lifetime in seconds
400 Invalid bucket or missing object path
401 JWT token missing or invalid
403 No permission to access this file
GET /api/v1/minio/{bucket}/{objectPath} Stream file from MinIO
Streams a file from MinIO storage through the proxy. **Authentication (one of):** - `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` header — standard JWT auth, full permission check runs in the server. - `?token=<presigned>` query parameter — HMAC-signed token obtained from `POST /api/v1/minio/presign/:bucket/*`. No Authorization header needed. Permission was already verified when the token was issued. **Allowed buckets:** - `user-image-profiles` — user profile images - `user-attachments` — user attachments - `ticket-attachments` — ticket attachments - `ticket-comment-attachments` — comment attachments
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{bucket} string <span class="param-required">required</span>
{objectPath} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Full object path within the bucket
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
token string optional Presigned proxy token (alternative to Bearer header)
Responses
200 File stream
400 Invalid bucket or missing object path
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string
message string
401 No credentials provided or presigned token invalid/expired
403 No permission to access this file
404 File not found
POST /api/v1/minio/{bucket}/{objectPath} Generate a presigned proxy URL for a file
Generates a short-lived presigned URL for the same file path that does **not** require an `Authorization` header when accessed. Use this for cross-platform clients that cannot set custom headers: - React Native `<Image>` and `<Video>` components - Native iOS `AVPlayer` / `WKWebView` media loading - Cached image libraries (FastImage, etc.) **Flow:** 1. POST to this endpoint with your JWT Bearer token. 2. Use the returned `url` directly as `source.uri` — no `Authorization` header needed. **Security:** - Requires JWT authentication to issue the token. - Same permission check as the GET stream endpoint runs at issuance time. - Token is HMAC-signed and scoped to the exact bucket + object path. - Token TTL is configurable via `MINIO_PRESIGN_TTL` (default: 900 s / 15 min).
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{bucket} string <span class="param-required">required</span> MinIO bucket name
{objectPath} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Full object path within the bucket (e.g. `userId/fileName.jpg`)
Responses
200 Presigned URL generated successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string
content string
└ url string Proxy URL with embedded signed token (no Authorization header needed)
└ expiresAt string <date-time> ISO 8601 timestamp when the token expires
└ ttl string Token lifetime in seconds
400 Invalid bucket or missing object path
401 JWT token missing or invalid
403 No permission to access this file

System

Queue Management

BullMQ scheduler and job management (Admin only)

GET /api/v1/queue/schedulers List all job schedulers
Returns all registered repeatable job schedulers in the BullMQ queue, including their cron pattern, timezone, and next execution time.
Responses
200 Schedulers retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
data string
└ schedulers string[]
401 Unauthorized
403 Forbidden - SYSTEM_ADMIN role required
POST /api/v1/queue/schedulers/{id}/enable Enable (create or update) a job scheduler
Creates or updates a repeatable job scheduler with the given cron pattern. This operation is idempotent — calling it multiple times with the same `id` will update the existing scheduler. **Known scheduler IDs:** - `daily-ticket-auto-complete` — runs `auto-complete-ticket` job - `daily-ticket-overdue-check` — runs `update-ticket-overdue-status` job - `test-job-schedule` — runs `test-job`
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Scheduler ID (maps to a registered job name)
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
cron string required Cron expression (standard 5-field)
timezone string IANA timezone string (default Asia/Bangkok)
message string Optional message payload for test-job
Responses
201 Scheduler enabled successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
data string
└ scheduler string
└ id string
└ name string
└ pattern string
└ timezone string
└ nextRunAt string <date-time> nullable
└ enabled string
400 Missing required field (cron)
401 Unauthorized
403 Forbidden - SYSTEM_ADMIN role required
DELETE /api/v1/queue/schedulers/{id} Disable a job scheduler
Removes a repeatable job scheduler from the queue. Future executions will be cancelled. Jobs already in the queue will still complete.
Path Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
{id} string <span class="param-required">required</span> Scheduler ID to disable
Responses
200 Scheduler disabled successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
data string
└ id string
401 Unauthorized
403 Forbidden - SYSTEM_ADMIN role required
404 Scheduler not found
GET /api/v1/queue/jobs List recent jobs
Returns recent jobs from all queues (scheduled and notification) across all states (active, waiting, completed, failed).
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
limit string optional Maximum jobs per state to return
Responses
200 Jobs retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
data string
└ count string
└ jobs string[]
401 Unauthorized
403 Forbidden - SYSTEM_ADMIN role required
POST /api/v1/queue/jobs/trigger Manually trigger a job
Adds a job to the queue for immediate execution, bypassing the cron schedule. Useful for testing or one-off runs. **Available job names:** - `update-ticket-overdue-status` — bulk-updates overdue status for all open tickets - `test-job` — logs a message to the application log
Request Body <span class="param-required">(required)</span>

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
jobName string [auto-complete-ticket, update-ticket-overdue-status, test-job] required Name of the registered job to run
data string Optional job payload
Responses
201 Job queued successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
message string
data string
└ jobId string
400 Missing jobName or unknown job name
401 Unauthorized
403 Forbidden - SYSTEM_ADMIN role required

Organization - Departments

Department management operations

GET /api/v1/organization/department Get all departments with pagination
Retrieve a paginated list of all departments
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string optional Page number (1-based, ignored when limit=-1)
limit string optional Items per page. Use -1 to return all results.
search string optional Free-text search (split by whitespace, AND logic). Searchable fields: code, nameTh, nameEn
divisionCode string optional Filter by division code
isActive string optional Filter by active status
orderField string optional Field to sort by
orderSort string optional Sort direction
Responses
200 Departments retrieved successfully

File Management

File upload, download, and export operations for data management

GET /api/v1/files/template Download data import template
Download a template file for data import (address, organization, prefix, etc.)
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
type string optional Type of data template to download
format string optional File format
Responses
200 Template file downloaded successfully
401 Unauthorized
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required Error message
errorCode string required Error code identifier
content string nullable Additional error details
timestamp string <date-time> nullable
requestId string nullable

Content-Type: multipart/form-data · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription

type string [address, organization, prefix] Type of data to process (default: "address")
Responses
201 File uploaded and processed successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator

requestId string nullable

Content-Type: application/json · Type: string

NameTypeRequiredDescription
type string [address, organization, prefix] required Type to export
format string [csv, xlsx, json] Export format
filters string Optional filters for export
includeInactive string Whether to include inactive records (default: false)
Responses
200 Data exported successfully

Delete a file by its ID

200 File deleted successfully

Address - Search

GET /api/v1/address/search Search addresses with language support
Search sub-districts with full address hierarchy and computed full address fields
Query Parameters
NameTypeRequiredDescription
query string optional Search term for address (searches sub-district, district, province, and country names)
postalCode string optional Filter by postal code
lang string optional Language for response content
page string optional Page number (1-based, ignored when limit=-1)
limit string optional Items per page. Use -1 to return all results.
orderField string[] optional Field(s) to sort by (e.g., nameEn, postalCode). Can be multiple.
orderSort string[] optional Sort direction(s) corresponding to orderField fields (asc/desc). Default is asc.
fresh string optional If true, ignore cache and fetch fresh data from database
Responses
200 Addresses retrieved successfully
NameTypeRequiredDescription
success string
data string[]
pagination string
└ page string
└ limit string
└ total string
└ totalPages string
└ hasNext string
└ hasPrev string
message string
401 Unauthorized
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required Error message
errorCode string required Error code identifier
content string nullable Additional error details
timestamp string <date-time> nullable
requestId string nullable
500 Internal server error
NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required Error message
errorCode string required Error code identifier
content string nullable Additional error details
timestamp string <date-time> nullable
requestId string nullable

System

POST /api/v1/system/cache/flush Flush all caches
Clears all data from both in-memory cache and Redis database. Use with caution.
Responses
200 Cache flushed successfully

status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result

Component Schemas

ApiResponse

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator
message string required Human-readable message describing the result
content string nullable Response data payload
errorCode string nullable Error code (only present for error responses)
timestamp string <date-time> nullable Response timestamp
requestId string nullable Unique request identifier for tracking
PaginatedResponse

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success] required
message string required
content string required
└ data string[] required Array of data items
└ pagination string required
└ page string required Current page number (always 1 when limit=-1/unlimited)
└ limit string required Items per page, or total count when unlimited (limit=-1)
└ total string required Total number of items across all pages
└ totalPages string required Total number of pages (always 1 when limit=-1/unlimited)
└ hasNext string required Whether there is a next page (always false when unlimited)
└ hasPrev string required Whether there is a previous page (always false on page 1)
Pagination

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string required Current page number (always 1 when limit=-1/unlimited)
limit string required Items per page, or total count when unlimited (limit=-1)
total string required Total number of items across all pages
totalPages string required Total number of pages (always 1 when limit=-1/unlimited)
hasNext string required Whether there is a next page (always false when unlimited)
hasPrev string required Whether there is a previous page (always false on page 1)
ErrorResponse

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required Error message
errorCode string required Error code identifier
content string nullable Additional error details
timestamp string <date-time> nullable
requestId string nullable
User

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
id string <uuid> required User unique identifier
username string required Unique username
email string <email> nullable User email (nullable for employees)
taxId string nullable Tax identification number
phone string nullable Phone number
firstName string required First name
lastName string required Last name
nickName string nullable Nickname
imageUrl string nullable Profile image URL
role string [CUSTOMER, EMPLOYEE, SYSTEM_ADMIN] required User role in the system
status string [ACTIVE, INACTIVE, DELETED, PENDING] required Account status
emailVerified string required Whether email is verified
phoneVerified string required Whether phone is verified
lastLoginAt string <date-time> nullable Last login timestamp
createdAt string <date-time> required Account creation timestamp
updatedAt string <date-time> required Last update timestamp
ValidationError

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
content string nullable
└ errors string Field-level validation errors
AuthenticationError

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [UNAUTHORIZED, AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED, AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID] required
AuthorizationError

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [FORBIDDEN, AUTH_INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS, ROLE_RESTRICTION] required
ServerError

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string required
RegisterRequest

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
email string <email> required User email address
password string <password> required User password
firstName string required First name
lastName string required Last name
phone string required Phone number with country code
taxId string Tax identification number (optional)
RefreshTokenRequest

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
refreshToken string required JWT refresh token
CreateUserRequest

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
email string <email> required User email address
password string <password> required User password
firstName string required First name
lastName string required Last name
phone string Phone number
role string [CUSTOMER, EMPLOYEE, SYSTEM_ADMIN] required User role
OAuthRequest

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
provider string [google, apple] required OAuth provider
accessToken string required OAuth access token
CreateCustomerRequest

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
userId string <uuid> required ID of the associated user
winspeedId string nullable Winspeed ERP customer ID
taxId string nullable Tax identification number (legacy field)
companyName string nullable Company name (legacy field)
CustomerResponse

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
id string <uuid> Customer unique identifier
userId string <uuid> Associated user ID
winspeedId string nullable Winspeed ERP customer ID
createdAt string <date-time> Creation timestamp
updatedAt string <date-time> Last update timestamp
ReceiptMethod

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
id string <uuid> Receipt method unique identifier
nameTh string Receipt method name in Thai
nameEn string Receipt method name in English
sortNo string Sort order number
isActive string Whether the receipt method is active
createdAt string <date-time> Creation timestamp
updatedAt string <date-time> Last update timestamp
Workflow

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
id string <uuid> Workflow unique identifier
nameTh string Workflow name in Thai
nameEn string Workflow name in English
description string nullable Workflow description
ticketTypeId string <uuid> Associated ticket type ID
version string Workflow version number
isActive string Whether the workflow is active
isDefault string Whether this is the default workflow for the ticket type
createdAt string <date-time> Creation timestamp
updatedAt string <date-time> Last update timestamp
TicketStep

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
id string <uuid> Step unique identifier
nameTh string Step name in Thai
nameEn string Step name in English
workflowId string <uuid> Associated workflow ID
sortNo string Sort order within workflow
isStart string Whether this is the starting step
isEnd string Whether this is the final step
canDelete string Whether this step can be deleted
createdAt string <date-time> Creation timestamp
updatedAt string <date-time> Last update timestamp
TicketStepStatus

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
id string <uuid> Status unique identifier
nameTh string Internal status name in Thai
nameEn string Internal status name in English
publicNameTh string Customer-facing status name in Thai
publicNameEn string Customer-facing status name in English
sortNo string Sort order within step
isEnd string Whether this status marks step completion
allowedEmployee string Whether employees can set this status
allowedCustomer string Whether customers can set this status
allowedSystem string Whether the system can auto-set this status
requireComment string Whether a comment is required
requireAttachment string Whether an attachment is required
requireAppointment string Whether an appointment is required
requireInternalComment string Whether an internal comment is required
NotFoundError

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [error] required
message string required
errorCode string [NOT_FOUND, EMPLOYEE_NOT_FOUND, USER_NOT_FOUND, TICKET_NOT_FOUND] required
MinioProxyError

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string
message string
PresignedProxyUrl

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
url string Proxy URL with embedded signed token (no Authorization header needed)
expiresAt string <date-time> ISO 8601 timestamp when the token expires
ttl string Token lifetime in seconds
PresenceSession

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
userId string
role string
ip string
socketId string
connectedAt string <date-time>
userAgent string
CreateTicketRequest

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
subject string required Ticket subject/title
subjectId string <uuid> Optional predefined subject ID
description string required Detailed description of the issue
customerId string <uuid> required Customer ID (usually the logged-in customer)
receiptMethodId string <uuid> How the ticket was received (e.g., phone, email, walk-in). Required only for Product Claim tickets.
priorityId string <uuid> required Ticket priority level
workflowId string <uuid> required Workflow to use for this ticket
customerProfileId string <uuid> required Customer profile to use
customerProfileProjectId string <uuid> Optional project associated with ticket
estimatedDate string <date-time> Estimated completion date
attachments string[] Array of attachment URLs or IDs
ticketDetails string[] Product details for warranty claims
ticketTags string[] Array of tag IDs to associate with ticket
ticketInfos string[] Optional dynamic ticket metadata (key-value pairs)
TicketResponse

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string
message string
content string
└ ticket string
└ id string <uuid>
└ code string
└ subject string
└ description string
└ customerId string <uuid>
└ customer string
└ currentStatus string
└ priority string
└ workflow string
└ ticketInfos string[] Dynamic ticket metadata
└ createdAt string <date-time>
└ updatedAt string <date-time>
TicketStatsResponse

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string
message string
content string
└ stats string
└ totalTickets string
└ ticketsByStatus string[]
└ ticketsByPriority string[]
└ averageResolutionTime string nullable Average hours to resolve a ticket
CreateTicketCommentRequest

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
comment string required Comment text content
isInternal string Whether the comment is internal (only visible to employees). Ignored for non-employee roles. (default: false)
TicketCommentResponse

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string
message string
content string
└ id string <uuid>
└ ticketId string <uuid>
└ userId string <uuid>
└ comment string
└ isInternal string
└ isRating string Whether this comment is a rating review from customer
└ stars string nullable Rating score 1-5, only set when isRating is true
└ createdAt string <date-time>
└ updatedAt string <date-time>
PaginationMeta

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string Current page number (always 1 when limit=-1/unlimited)
limit string Items per page, or total count when unlimited (limit=-1)
total string Total number of items across all pages
totalPages string Total number of pages (always 1 when limit=-1/unlimited)
hasNext string Whether there is a next page (always false when unlimited)
hasPrev string Whether there is a previous page (always false on page 1)
AttachmentDto

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
id string <uuid>
ticketId string <uuid>
commentId string <uuid> nullable
userId string <uuid>
fileName string
fileUrl string MinIO proxy URL for accessing the file
fileType string [VIDEO, IMAGE, FILE]
mimeType string
fileSize string File size in bytes
duration string nullable Video duration in seconds (for VIDEO type only)
createdAt string <date-time>
updatedAt string <date-time>
AttachmentWithUserDto

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
id string <uuid>
ticketId string <uuid>
commentId string <uuid> nullable
userId string <uuid>
fileName string
fileUrl string MinIO proxy URL for accessing the file
fileType string [VIDEO, IMAGE, FILE]
mimeType string
fileSize string File size in bytes
duration string nullable Video duration in seconds (for VIDEO type only)
createdAt string <date-time>
updatedAt string <date-time>
user string User who attached the file
└ id string <uuid>
└ username string
└ firstName string
└ lastName string
└ role string [CUSTOMER, EMPLOYEE, SYSTEM_ADMIN] Role of the user who attached the file
└ imageUrl string nullable
FileInfo

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
fileName string Unique file name on storage
originalName string Original file name from upload
mimeType string
fileSize string File size in bytes
checksum string MD5 checksum for deduplication
uploadedAt string <date-time>
url string Proxy URL to access the file
FileUploadResult

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
fileName string
originalName string
url string
checksum string
action string [created, replaced, skipped] Action taken based on checksum comparison
message string
BatchUploadResult

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
uploaded string[]
failed string[]
summary string
└ total string
└ created string
└ replaced string
└ skipped string
└ failed string

ApiResponse

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
status string [success, error] required Response status indicator

Pagination

Type: object

NameTypeRequiredDescription
page string required Current page number (1-based). Always 1 when limit=-1.
limit string required Items per page. Equals total when limit=-1 (unlimited).
total string required Total number of items
totalPages string required Total number of pages. Always 1 when limit=-1.
hasNext string required Whether there is a next page. Always false when limit=-1.
hasPrev string required Whether there is a previous page. Always false when limit=-1.
ErrorResponse

Type: object

status string [error] required

errorCode string required Error code identifier
